After taming all conquers of yours, letting them flow their new yours given way.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom from Desire and the Champion's Ease
General.content: Becoming free from them gives you this chill, not replicable by those who visually are holding tension, after battling out with their will, whether about eating that cheesecake, whether to get on studying, see they have pressure on themselves to work, to do what they are supposed to do. You? You just know wholeheartedly you will. You have gone through all those battles, you are now freed from desire. It's refreshing too for people to see champions that seem to take stuff so lightly and value them so much.

General.title: Idea: On Solitude and the Inner Dialogue
General.content: For the solitary one person around is too many, Nietzsche says, that it prevents the two of the solitary, him and his mind, to take the moment into greater depths. Thus I say company is enemy of truth. If right now what you wish is truth, all it takes and it takes all, is you alone. To be able to journey within into depths you are afraid to show another. There is no single one that knows you beyond the depths you are willing to go if you are alone, or rather with anyone you are not willing to go beyond certain depths. Truly being alone, that means being with nobody, not talking to Nietzsche, or who you are talking to in some of your free time, not having the company of society's mass produced memes. Truly yourself. Here can you search the big questions, and can you be free to do so. How much can you do that you can't do while with others? How many conversations there are no ears for in this world except your mind. How many places can you go only you comprehend. In essence how many limits the world places on your mind, that is what can be overcome as you stand with yourself. How much can you discover beyond the usual field of play you've been bound to. What would you actually do were you handed solitude for some amount of time? Those are some interesting questions. What voices are being muted by each bounding factor. What thoughts are better vocalized and more eloquently expressed when you are by yourself? This one particularly hits home for me. I'm much better able to produce ideas by writing or thinking by myself than when asked from people with people

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- At Least Be My Enemy
General.content: At least be my enemy if you can't be my friend, says Nietzsche in somewhat these words. If no one is your enemy then you perhaps don't really matter, or don't do something big. Heard this too from Andrew Tate, and from polarizability in general, people want to see your action, whether they are friends and want to see you rise or enemies and want to see you crumble. There is of course bullshit and stupidity in Andrew Tate, but there is also things to be taken, value to be taken by going where others don't dare perhaps for the deprecation of those around them. Perhaps being dangerous and choosing to work as a team is a build of solid friendship. Making your friendship valuable through mutual knowing of each others capabilities to end it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Friends as Mirrors of What to Overcome
General.content: Nietzsche here perhaps insinuating that in your friends you see you that must be overcome. Your friend show you how you must improve, for you see in them what you look like and what you have to improve.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Good and Evil as Signs of Will to Power
General.content: Nietzsche seems to imply that everyone's good and evil tells us about their overcomings and their will to power.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Tablet of Good and Evil as Prediction Tool
General.content: Perhaps obvious but never by me said that this tablet of good and evil in every person which dress their will to power is the single most valuable thing in understanding someone and predict them.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude as All You Need
General.content: Perhaps the straddled principle across these lately ideas, that solitude is all you should ever need. You can live with you and your cause. More than living humans, loving causes he preaches. You love in the other what you envy he says. Be yourself a cause and thus have the highest love for yourself. I am the cause. I am the revolution. If you can't endure being with yourself, you are doomed to keep searching and lurking and looting and looking. What you look to find you should bring about from yourself. You should create that person you love talking to, and the one who does things the way you love. Your perception is your perception not others'

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Knowing Your Power
General.content: That talking contrary to what you don't know is a greater lie than contrary to what you know. This Nietzsche says. for in the first one you fool yourself, in the latter you betray yourself. You don't yet see what you are, what you will be, the extent of your empire without limits, so talking about it as if you know it is failing oneself. Tens de conhecer o teu poder. What a shame if you get out of this place without knowing your true power, perhaps because you were afraid to unleash it, perhaps you let it slip. But not coming to see your final form, whether physical, which Socrates pointed out, whether spiritually mentally lifely, is failing yourself. Perhaps one of the big questions is what can you be.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Individuality Before the Group
General.content: One should then realize this before handing oneself to the neighbor. Not letting your individuality get faded to the group, that you be letting go of control, but rather augmenting it through it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Loving Yourself: Polishing the Vision
General.content: Loving yourself becomes much about polishing and cleaning the dust off your vision, always having it fresh, embracing the moment in the light of the overhuman presence you seek to realize.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Being the Strength, Not Just Having It
General.content: Not just having a strength, not just having a right, not just having a cause and having a why, but being the strength and the right, and the cause and the why.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Climb Past, Then Fly
General.content: Being able to climb past, but then fly.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Building the Impregnable Identity
General.content: Again the process of rebuilding oneself. To build the most impregnable identity, unshakable force of nature within you, you can't wait for it to get destroyed out there. You battle test it, you put your beliefs and wills out there through the roughest conditions, you bombard until only the strongest survive, until the most solid foundations let themselves out to be seen. You dress down all into the bare body which you carry with you into the next battle. Too much weight wears you, you must stick with the simplest yet most absolute bases before you start building on top. You thus have the most high density of quality robust trustworthy alignment within. Your troops, absolutely loyal to you. You try to kill these things which you have on your side, yet to strengthen the deserved few.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Love and the Creation Beyond the Self
General.content: Love of yourself makes you despise yourself in going for the creation beyond yourself, makes you perish. Becoming the overhuman is being the overhuman perhaps.

General.title: Idea: On Silence, Frame Control, and True Questions
General.content: Quotes and questions: it is tendency to think that that thing which we lack so much, which I lack so much, which is keeping in mind the long run in the now, having that greatness instinct even when you are doing the most dull thing, that truthness that you forget and substitute thus for lesser things, thus you think you have nothing to do, when you have very much the very opposite. This you think is solved by throwing in stuff to the mind, like music, motivational videos or whatever, when in reality it is found in silence. Truth is better cultivated alone and alone of the rest. Doing nothing for 2 hours may bring back the truth you once recognized. It can furthermore make you see things your body and mind are perhaps trying to say to you of a long time, that yet didn't go through all the noise, couldn't make it to the surface amidst all the pressure that was put on the moment. More is less. The force builds in you clarity. You have a real question, and don't know the answer? You have a dilemma? Sit in silence and the answers will be clear. A la antiga a la kung fu panda, most of the training and time spent by the warrior is reflecting, looking at the water and seeing it look back. Most of the time is spent in the confinement of your mind, in the light of your shadow, finding yourself. The show that others see is in scope very limited to all you've blessed. It is only the very top of the iceberg that others can see, that others can understand. Your job is to make this blackbox of a thing come to life, take all that only you can understand all that's puzzling the self and figure it all out, all, and only you can, and make it come true in what is seen by others. people then ask why in movies they have such assuredness, why they do it like in movies, natural unwavering faith in their outcome. True main character stuff, that you go your way and your way is the way. But there it is they know damn better than others the world they want to be, and they make it, and they make others live in it. The stronger the frame the more likely it becomes everyone's frame. The more truthness and suredness the frame carries, the stronger it gets, The more undeniable, talk about frame control in the life man. this is what they have. What they hold. So much power is in the frame. I will, the masters of frame know. those who have learned to live without reality are the ones who come to find their reality and make it. Those who tune to the deeper frequencies of thought lower levels of questions. This way is not about feeling moving, but about finding the right direction to move to, then go for it. Finding the worthy opponents, the worthy bridges of overcoming, the worthy flags in top of the mountains, into the overhuman. There are few questions that you must answer in your life, most of people spend life, not enjoy it, actually spend it without facing the questions, perhaps because just off the top of their head they don't see clearly the answer, and they have no interest in seeking deeper. Life is mostly about getting away from noise and finding the gem in the sea. Because its huge, this is the way to go. Quality of decisions. Quality of output into the true great questions

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Sensing Uncomprehended Strength
General.content: Nietzsche, that there is such a thing as sensing strength but not being able to comprehend it. I feel like this we fear, when we sense strength and we comprehend it after, it diminishes it. We don't fear our place in the will to power wheel. Our ego can sleep rested. But if we see strength where we can't understand it. Then we run, then we either deal with it, and let it become our strength or we deny it, we push it further down, slimming down yet expanding the bubble size of the cookie monster. It is power thus to have unseen strength, to have uncomprehended strength. dude why people admit they are tired. This is a nonsense I cannot tolerate by hearing and not writing no more. Like what. Unbelievable few understand this. Actually ridiculously unbelievable, and perhaps it is children who better grasp the concept. I don't see a world where it making sense. But yeah back on topic,

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Undefeated by the Pressure of the Moment
General.content: Once again the pressure came, but we are still undefeated, had to get out of training, lost the subway because took too much time finding the pass in the bag, thought the pressure was catching up but after all it was chill, then get home and there take too much time but still chill getting to the subway, about a 5 min margin from sub to train, but the subway gets late, is full, had to force myself in, then it stops at a station for like 5 minutes, because someone went unconscious leaving the subway. I sprint to the train, and it was late and we got the w.

General.title: Idea: On Small Worries and the Meritocracy of Competence
General.content: still quotes and questions: it is quite pathetic too that small worries take over the lives of people. That the more, people let themselves be controlled and submitted by impulses small little impulses. Like hunger. Chill, I know I'll eat when I get home, so this signal my body is sending is to be ignored. Don't let it stop you. Have control over, and now you are free to fly. Now you can focus on the real bigger things that can throw you off. Now you can come back and join that internal locus of control that you have. That deep self that you know you can't avoid, now you can again connect with him and get aligned. fame alone isn't something one wants. It is only constricting. If there was such a thing as just being famous, the hell out with it. You couldn't go by any way, seas of people would swarm you, you'd have the private means you may say, but that is not fame, money we associate with fame, yet distinct they remain. Power we associate with fame, goodness of being, skill, competence, no. the brutal meritocracy of competence Tate I heard say he believes in, and the hell it is true. The hell it is true. It gives the absolute most power and control to us, thus we believe it thus its true, it's the biggest bang for buck belief, it favours you the most, its a fixed point. Investing in your self type of belief.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Living Ahead of Your Time
General.content: Sometimes its a matter of being young enough to comprehend strength. To see strength and opportunity different from those too old living ahead of your time. This is a hard of a thing. To see what is going on now and be able to know it will be so futile in the future, the way we do things now, our time, my friend, will all be replaced and seen as dull and slow and dumb. And to picture yourself there at the future looking back on the way we did things, n thats disconcerting Like looking at the sound this train makes. I can go through it, doesn't bother me one bit. But somewhere out there in the future is absolute seamless transport, one that extends what this train already does so well for me and allows me, after developing the necessary strength, to be zoned out as if not travelling. To me it is the exact same being here or being at home at the table reading or being at the library reading. Equalizer. Your strength as weapon makes equalizers. But yeah one day rather than this for most displeaserous sound there will be a sound that activates productivity and happiness and meaning all at once, while being able to do what you want and not just remain seated. Distance will no longer be a factor. Time too in this constrict sense that it won't matter to you how much time a trip takes to get there. But still travelling in time will yield losses. you still will lose time by moving forward in time. most can't even live in the moment let alone be present in the future.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Men in the Matrix
General.content: Quite saddening too to look at grown ass men still in the matrix.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Fluidity of Movement and Unfazedness
General.content: Remember, peace of mind brings fluidity of movement. Have it sorted out, know the direction and achieve peace through low level thinking. and I'm telling you, if the sound of the subway causes you anger, if you can't take that hit, if hunger makes you lose intention and volition, then my man you are not even playing at the right game yet. You still are battling against yourself. First align yourself, then make the world align to you. And I was guilty of that at some point, by letting small losses that don't matter take me down and make me not understand that I have to be the best, I am. If you let anything external get to you, fix that. Nothing can stop me I'm all the way up. Thus one develops this peace of being with everything external, an unfazedness regarding everything it may bring. You are unreactive to all the fake battles it suggests to you. You know what the real battles are, you know when you should panic and not. The naturality of the cat, unfazed to everything yet knows when its time to go ham. Not afraid of the dark, the last to move, but the first to move the fastest when given enough evidence, the first to get out. Luck takes work. Takes preparation. What stoicism looks like when it isn't covered by all the media spam wording and connotation and glamour vision. Eventually you become virtually undefeatable, there is nothing outside of you that can hurt you. Comfort becomes a luxury, and it can't pollute your heart. In these moments you've seen you climbed, and despite also doing a lot of bullshit, you climbed, this gives you a certainty that you will climb so much more. I am Inevitable. Perhaps because one gets that extra push after seeing others give up. Seeing others getting frustrated gives you energy. Seeing others give up when I ran cross country and endurance events, seeing I won, that gave such an extra push. And a big fat one'- sleepiness. This one is a motherfucker, I lost control on it sometimes

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Freedom of Not Giving a Damn
General.content: Its above all a peace and rest as in the opposite of unrest to not give a damn what others think and especially not caring if they recognize your worth. Short story, they won't period. But not giving a f about that allows you to win so much more, you are not dependent on that vision that others have of you. It lets you keep moving forward through island and sea, through storm and sunset, through hell and paradise and back. all of a sudden you come back to respecting yourself so much more and valuing your time so much more. being able to vibe to a music with no headphones and through the sound of the train.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accepting the Passage of Time
General.content: Further accept the passage of time. Here in the train I haven't checked time in a minute, I have no clue, and I'd rather keep it that way. Time can't work against you, rather it works for you. I have accepted staying here forever and just doing this. One must imagine Sisyphus happy. Don't even know if I'm travelling forwards or backwards

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Endurance and Repetitive Motions
General.content: And man I genuinely believe I could easily get through that chinese torture of the perpetuous drop of water, I think I'd just be chilling. But there is such a thing as going crazy over these unusual repetitive motions, your brain can actually get freaked out. I think at least I have more endurance in this aspect than most.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Building Yourself Before Overcoming
General.content: "Over and beyond yourself shall you build. But first you must be built yourself." to prolong and accept as if willing to stop all your life for you, through means of children, asks of you that you have yourself dominated. Now you have accountability, now you can't afford mistakes. All that is to be done is done and all is said too. Are you ready to call it? Well don't if its going to be you and your child against the world, especially if it is against parts of you that you are fighting with. "not only onward shall you propagate onto, but upward!". Overcoming oneself before so then you can reach farther. The higher the leaves are dropped from the tree you have grown to love, the farther they reach, the farther you see.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Surprise Effect of Hidden Knowledge
General.content: What I was saying about you not giving a damn what others think of you and so not trying to show you know, being content with only you understanding yourself and your worth. This it brings the surprise effect when you actually are asked for the opportunity to show your knowledge in a certain specialty of yours. Like me here and there actually getting excited talking about training or whatever to others.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Free Death
General.content: On free death is the title if you allow your death to come free, my friend you're not. And you pay the price on this loss of control. it's as if a basketball player didn't retire but rather wait for the day where his knees fell off. We like to mark ends to things, except our life. Or ending a movie or a podcast when the battery of the camera died out.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Relative Aging of Spirit and Body
General.content: The interplay of staying young till late yet aging through some of the victories and truths of youth. Changing in body but remaining in spirit. Changing in dress but staying in body. Nietzsche says in some the heart ages in others the spirit. And this is one hell of a truth people don't take into account, the aging process of each thing that makes one up. Bryan johnson has unlocked the relative aging of all cells, but one ought to go further and see how certain jokes are relative to thoughts relative to how your maturity ages versus how your fashion ages and how your face ages and how your physical condition ages and how your spirit and beliefs age. you want to evolve, not age, for as long as possible. Never in final form. The natural tendency is alignment of all ages, it's a stable equilibrium. If your spirit is younger than your body, you might go a little too harsh doing sport with your son and end up on the sidelines, effectively aging your body. This perhaps an argument for generality entity, being an all purpose agent. Attacking everything. This I know and do and few do and know.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Preserving the Youth of the Spirit
General.content: I think its way closer than everyone thinks in terms of what you can preserve young, people think spirit is the only one and still lose it

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Longevity and the Late Bloomer
General.content: Understand too that if you are going to have more longevity, you are going to be a late bloomer, all will be increasing the distance to you until age starts working against them. It's a long term game. The most ripe fruit takes the most time being prepped.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Life Affirming Death
General.content: Nietzsche paints the picture that your dying should be that of a life affirming being. Your energy should glow into love of the earthly and human. Free for and free from dying. Do not waste your death, and that means make people ripe from of your life. May your dying pass on the value of your living to others. May you thus let space for life to be lived, that life that you brought about. Lead the life, and die for the students to live theirs. A leader must then give space to his followers so they are their own followers.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Value of Uselessness and Immortality
General.content: That the highest value is conferred to gold for its scarcity, shine and uselessness. By the last one can't measure its value, it is valueless and thereby can be given any value. It is visible by everybody, and few can have it. So the most valuable thing is what everyone sees, what no one can't have, and is useful. But this only confers value. One can define value through uselessness. Immortality confirms itself as the highest value thing if it was wrapped into an object like figure. Control of time. Of the Universe. What would be the gold of the Universe then, for all worlds out there. Perhaps the inside of a black hole? No for it can't be seen. Dark matter isn't luminous enough and perhaps can be useful. Perhaps all useless things are much less known because of that, and so its hard to even name one.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Evolution and Competition
General.content: Quotes and questions think of someone you know and see their evolution, and do not reject that they've changed, do not regret that they've gotten severely better. See the argument there is to make that they are winning in life against you. Confront that possibility for everyone, as if you are playing by yourself against the world. And the battle never ends. Don't think just because you think you won back then with something that you have the right to not maintain and improve your situation. The fairness of life comes in the absoluteness of the moment, the inexistence of anything beyond that. The past is only your servant, any win either propels you forward or else does nothing.

General.title: Idea: The Bestowing Virtue and Transcending Levels
General.content: The bestowing virtue is an elevation over and beyond. A conquest of the world and yourself, having battled it out, having been through it all, you emerge through the clouds not to be bothered again by those opponents you defeated and took as one of your own. One bridges to the overhuman through expansion of the human all too human. The human is something that is to be overcome. One doesn't progress the quality of life by playing in ever more fields, but by playing in higher fields. By transcending the levels.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- AI, Memory, and the Death of the Internet
General.content: As the internet dissolves into LLMs, into AI, in its search and generate information capacity, those same AIs will have less data to pull from, so more important will become the data that they get from our conversations and interactions with those ais. Suddenly context length can be greater, it no longer suffices to give a good answer, one ought to get a good answer for one's specific situation. So all the context is our previous conversations, not just what we say. It will engulf human behaviour thus, with memory he shifts on the spectrum from writing knowledge to write us. Finally one can look at the death of internet through mediation for AIs. Barely any service will be better done with humans than AI. Quora already has the answer of POE ahead of people's answers. Still we take this bet, its a self generating thing, we bet that our generation and production that feeds the models will help us produce more

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On the Duality of Speed and Depth
General.content: Quotes and questions- I have these two strong inclinations that yet seem very exclusive to each other. One the efficiency ultra high bandwidth maximizing the speed of my life and consuming more information being exposed to more through information than anyone out there, having seen all the greats and been with them, with their mindsets. And yet the other view of maximum depth and thus no exposure, being only a matter of one's thought, not seeing all thoughts out there. Slow and meaningful. I have been developing them separately, but it remains to be seen how I will crystallize them into something so much bigger.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: High Bandwidth, Searching Vast Spaces, and Long Term Vision
General.content: Quotes and questions- with these big scale information networks as an agent you don't want to get lost on the fluff, you need the ability to search vast spaces and get the most value, reach the gems of it and get out. This contributes to the fast and wide part of my duality that I want to crystallize. The other is the slow and deep, the value you create slowly from within, meaningful. So right now searching google on a topic and retrieving the relevant points of information of all corners you seek is fundamental for you to get stuff done fast. Perhaps a start to solving this is when in the battlefield have the capability to move like hell, to compress all and get it done, so then you have time for deeper things. One gets this idea that by having bandwidth, which has the consequence of effectively increasing intelligence, as you see others moving slowly and are capable of having more output, you get to for example watch youtube videos at 2.5x speed. Which on the one hand, you may contend, makes you remember few and not understand much, but on the other, it allows you to skip all uninteresting stuff and get to the real juice, at which point you may open your ears more by slowing down and deepening. It allows you to search the space so much faster and have so many more options. Don't feel guilty thus if you don't finish something or you didn't pay attention along the way. Move on, the world was not made to see every alley, you must be able to move beyond the dirt that slows you down. If you didn't get something the first time, consider not going in there a second. Consider that maybe you are right and that which perhaps others in the world said was interesting for you simply doesn't do it. Don't worry that you will never have mission complete, there is always something more. The game of life distinguishes itself from video games until now for this aspect of extension. An experiment it is, the path to the overhuman. I'm an experiment, that is perhaps emphasized by the emacs thing we will have. Insofar as these tools are concerned, no learning curve or challenge should let your long term vision fall, you shall bet on the long term. If there is a best, then go for it. Just like in travel, get just those things that change your life.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On the Unexplored and Untamed
General.content: Quotes and questions- there is this certain conspiracy and camaraderie and partner in crime vibe of you and the stars, you and your play. It isn't filmed or written down, just yours. Cause we get too caught up in what human built, we live inside that human's life, not to realize that there are still things impenetrable to all other humans. You and the world, not you and this of the humans thing. There is still untamed, there is still unexplored, you can step at any time into places no other will know.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Computation and Creation
General.content: Quotes and question- Arguably because of P being different from NP you should be careful in verifying work and doing it on your own. If something only takes a bit longer to do on your own rather than verifying what others did, you gain in doing it on your own. Or if there is unwanted work in transforming from others' space of actions and thoughts to your own, rather than just engulfing the problem into your configuration space. Strive for compression when absorbing, strive for going the way when creating. Its about managing computation. Sometimes if others don't prepare their work for you, like just copying and pasting their conversation with the LLM that led them to do some project, then you'd rather do it on your own. It becomes an interesting question whether you should do more of what you can do on your own or what you can't. Cause what you can you should automate if you don't learn any longer from doing it, while you can learn by seeing others do something you can't and trying it. Maximizing learning at every moment isn't conducive to ending projects and getting stuff organized, cause usually the finish of a project you don't learn much you simply want the badge of the end. But in the long term it can allow you to finish bigger more final projects.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Bandwidth and Supercharged Learning
General.content: Quotes and questions supercharging your learning is a real thing, having that higher bandwidth is a cheat code. The ability to move faster than anyone should be feared by those who don't have it. I will figure this out perhaps on a technological level with AI, beyond getting the most out of time. George Hotz said this thing that he doesn't need to hide his ideas, for he believes no one can compete with him in doing something with it faster than him. This thing that whatever you have going for you I'm gonna beat you to it. Effectively being ahead of one's time has this component of computation speed, like Nvidia CEO saying their chips allow you to travel in time

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Sam Altman on Productivity Enhancement
General.content: Quotes and questions on his three observations sam altman postulates that in some decades any human can be more productive and impactful than anyone alive today. This comes down to the enhancement of the human through AI for example. Having ever greater tools and abstractions that allows to move at speeds indeed previously inaccessible to humans. We move by train while they are going by car, and in the future movement will be made in air through planes, making each and every obstacles of the ground to which humans gave great efforts to conquer obsolete, our solutions won't be improved upon or rejected but simply irrelevant, the most painful of sentences. When you think of problems of the past, they don't even make sense. We move through them.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: On Social Mirroring II
General.content: Quotes and questions. so funny the effect of looking at people. If they look at you for example in a train you look away, and collective movement is a thing, if you all of a sudden move people will follow that and adjust themselves too.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Shame and the Right Reasons
General.content: Nietzsche says shame is the history of the human. yet it seems we are ashamed all for the wrong reasons. We should be ashamed when you see someone suffering more than us, someone working harder than us, someone learning more than us, doing more than us, and above all living more life than us, loving living more than us, or living loving more than us, or wanting more than us, or dreaming higher than us, or believing greater than us. Pitying rather than being ashamed Nietzsche says, those bastards pitiful bastards.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Irrelevancy and the Ghost's Freedom
General.content: The greatest unfairness, says Nietzsche, sickness I called it before, is not to be repugnant to someone, but him meaning nothing. Irrelevancy is the most disarming of experiences. Yet it brings you a certain distance away from the humans, gets you away from the noise. Gives you a certain freedom. Being a foreigner everywhere and having no one that knows you or cares about you is still freeing. You have no obligation towards anyone, you live in third person, as if watching humans, as a ghost. You can walk around with no pressure, no standard to meet, no form to take. Having nothing to hold onto, having no home, still gives a hell of a ride.

General.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- The Scale of Sustainable Complex Life
General.content: That sustainable complex life must find a scale where there are no too many fluctuations, where measurement makes sense and accurate laws can be deduced. Thus too small of life here on earth would have to fight brownian motion, would have little control over environment, and the time scales at which it can work are much more little. The bigger the organism the bigger scale in space and time, thus you see suns and planets exist in the most stable of configurations. They need stability to grow into that scale and live on it.

General.title: Idea: What is Life With Mind and Matter and Autobiographical Sketches- The World That Rewards Shallowness
General.content: This world at times rewards shallowness and width, for conversations don't usually get to the point where you show depth, rather a lot of conversations are best suited for those who know a lot but don't really know it. Books are read on their covers, their titles, but do you actually know about the thing you know exist? Its cool to know that hitler wrote a book, do you actually know what its about, have you read it? Sometimes we get too fixated on having meta knowledge without actually diving into content.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: The Champion Has a Name
General.content: Quotes and questions there is a certain pain, but to me it goes away very fast and only rarely comes about, about being the only one. About seeing most around me making the wrong decisions, not understanding deeper things. There has never been none and there is only one. Me. The champion has a name baby. Not but now in seriousness, this is an experiment on human potential, this is a self actualization of the overhuman. I carry this message. I came so humanity understands itself, so the universe understands itself, so I understand myself. Just from a very projected to the ground point of view, no one out there has the grip like I do on knowledge and mindset, no one has as many doors open as me. There is no world expert at the intersection of many fields, let alone those that don't exist.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hero Who Must Not Become Priest
General.content: For a hero to not fall in the trap of the priest, he must come back around and be at peace with all that of hero was he. Know deep down inasmuch vigor that one has found the best path and that one must be content with knowing that alone, needing not to show others his vision thus. If one has suffered, know that it was voluntary, accept in the extreme case that all suffering one has yielded was voluntary and wasn't needed to get where one's got. Thus freeing oneself from the temptation of imposing that to others, acting as much part of the people as any other inverse of hero has done. Swallowing it whole. Not becoming priest of being a hero. For that imposes form and structure, form and structure that, as much as one has given his life to perfect, one has to accept the futility of it beyond anything that transcends the self. That any other will not understand this vision one preaches, that any other, alone, yet parallel to all others that move beyond the masses and rise to become themselves, will have to find his own form and structure. Thus one paradoxically reaches a state where one has the most to say, yet none of it can be heard. For example, after a long tribulous yet self actualizing career one is in the position to relate it all, yet it can't produce, that narration cannot bring further value than that career has produced. Only after doing all the climb does one know the way to climb. Only after all the work can one get the view that could have previously led him up. Thus the hero fools himself one last time reaching and expressing all his heroicity, not being able to contain it within.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hero's Last Self-Deception
General.content: Thus the hero fools himself one last time, now that he wants to express his heroicity. he doesn't understand all he did was for himself. All was voluntary. He starts to believe is mode a little too much, his narrative and vision start to become real to him, so much so that he wants to impose them onto others. He fails to realize that all that in him was hero is not anymore by this sharing. He cannot produce more than he has through making public all he went through to produce his stuff. structure

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Prisoners of Their Own Delusion
General.content: Prisoners of their delusion that their reality is not just theirs, even if they are right about it, one may go as far as to say. Giving away your story, what you so dearly deared real, having it be squandered, its tough. The realization that one may have wasted life away is as daunting as it is irrational. Cause the momentum builds up, and if one is brought down from the height of the world he has created, if that doubt starts creeping and tearing it, so that one can no longer even enjoy it, so that one cannot not just remember, but live with it, that it brings the highest of men to his knees. That one in this descent can thus fall far below the level of the ground. There is such a thing as sensitive information. One can easily overestimate his power against words and information, the overhuman overcomes this, so that he may die for words, yet live all the same for those he wishes. Most don't dare weather this storm. There is really such a thing as knowledge of something that can make you have no drive to live, lose all your will. I must go beyond this if I am to go further. The world is cruel, and just like we don't really grasp infinity, or the value of life, we don't grasp either what it feels like to know some things. We are but one human. How much can one human take. It is as easy to let something have no effect and let it kill you. A true 50\50, the fairest of things

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Rule of Thumb: Reject Those Who Sell Misery
General.content: Rule of thumb- if someone tries to sell you misery, maybe for some more or less eloquent reason, you probably don't want it. so always have this pinch of realism in whatever narrative you create for yourself.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- From Smallest to Greatest: Same Flesh
General.content: That continuous still is the transition from smallest to greatest human, topologically equivalent they are, naked they are but of the same flesh. There is no semblance of the overhuman yet

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- When Reading Yields Nothing
General.content: Just rode the whole chapter and didn't get anything.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Virtue Sold Cheaply
General.content: So cheap everyone sells virtue to themselves. So many virtues lying around, but so little selfs to carry their weight. Thus so lightly they invest to their virtue. So transitory their virtue is, rather a momentaneous ego booster than an unshakable tree that has grown out of them

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drinking Life Through Others' Bottles
General.content: Unfortunate for those who only drank the pleasure of life through other's bottles. What a shame that there are those who will never know beyond the masses, never come to see their way in life without them. Unclean and impure is the flame that you build with them, by putting wood into their construct.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Masses Must Be Wrong
General.content: Untrue the masses's spirit has to be, for there is still no overhuman. Wrong they have to be in some ways.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Masses' Inherited Power
General.content: We shouldn't neglect the amount of power that the masses hold and pass generation to generation, how much they can shape all of yesterday and tomorrow, a la 1984, even if no single one of them can grasp all their impact, or even know why the spirit is a certain way. Those that started and knew their reasons may be far gone, yet their consequences can live on if they aren't intentionally taken care of. We can be stuck on obeying orders from those that don't even exist. the other side of the coin of collective building and standing on the shoulders of giants

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Knowing the Border of the Game
General.content: being on another different level is much about being aware of the border of the game that the masses play, having no delusion about its scope and its domain of effectiveness. Not being fooled by the glow of what the game gives to those who play it. Those who will it their lives to trying to win this game. Those who thus rest their power on the belief on this game.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be a Strong Wind Above
General.content: Be a strong wind that flies over everyone, lives above the masses, has its representative a la god down there, that yet shows no glimpse of the sheer power it holds above.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dangerous Thought of Redundancy
General.content: the dangerous that those of the masses may not be needed, they may be redundant. That perhaps most people playing the game of the masses and drinking from its well may truly be irrelevant. That maybe most live truly unmeaningful lives. That Zarathustra almost chokes to death on this. This is a dangerous thought not to be carried out to its practical consequences, but to make one run away from the condition of having its life given away for outrem. It puts urgency into living one's way. This rabble shall carry yourself out of it. Shall be the source of your awareness and escape into your life. Thus one intentionally starts living. Being able to smell and swallow the masses pills, yet totally separated, verily of spirit, from this wind of the low lands. Pay it no mind. Pay every single ounce of mind you have into your way. Yet be unrepugnable by anyhow.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Thank the Many Too Many
General.content: Thank thus the many too many that allowed you to become one, the many too many pieces that allowed you to become whole and sharp. They showed you the way to climb.

General.title: Idea: On the Preacher of Equality
General.content: Preacher of equality of all another great idealists. Untrue to the nature of the world. Incapable of accepting the unfairness of the world sure, but incapable to adapt to win and win in that world? That is inefficient. The concept of justice is blind to the possibility that the present is all there is, and thus is fond of a revenge sentiment buildup in the soul. One thus forges within these forces of narrative, these unreal motives that drive one away from. The at every moment least action path. One runs the danger of dwelling on the past and thus trying to force equality. One can be thrown away from the path of victory for some past centered idea that instead could be made of more use by channeling of its energy into will or even, at times, of total withdrawal from memory.

General.title: Idea: On Enforcing Sameness
General.content: the preacher of equality may not just look for equality of justice but making everyone have the same condition as him, enforcing that others be the same as him.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Those Who Want to Punish Cannot Live in the Present
General.content: Those that want to punish cannot live in the present. They cannot believe in the unreality of the past. They seek power for the wrong reasons, to be at peace with the world they live in, not understanding neither that it isn't theirs nor that it has anything that needs rescue.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- From Diversity to Unification
General.content: The human is built on diversity, in diversification. The overhuman, on unification, the full cycle of what the seed that was planted as humans came to be had to give. From that on, its no longer human. Here we go.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Life Wants to Grow to Fly
General.content: Tis life itself, that is, my life, wants to grow into the heights, so that it can go far when it learns to fly. very simple phrase but that explains a lot

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overcoming Builds the Height to Fly
General.content: Thus with one's overcoming of values and concepts, one builds the height within, one wins the game, before one can fly away to level up. Weapons these values and concepts are for the destruction of the life you've been living into a greater one without them

General.title: Idea: On Talent, Equality, and Winning the Moment
General.content: I still hold the absolute belief of an equality but that to me is not this one. And maybe it is. Maybe I'm incoherent, and that gives me more power. But I have this belief from a very long time that Everyone has the same talent when integrated over all possible parameters. At least when one is born. That everyone has one thing they were born to be the best in the world in. But even here equality doesn't hang on very long, for environmental factors outside your control and, above all, your actions that are in your control Yet at every living moment there can be as a semi thought experiment leaderboard of who is winning the moment, who is winning life in this very moment, who is having the best life this very moment. And it is possible that one wins every single time. So no equality in that sense can make for this. It is possible to live a life better than every other combined.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Work Done in Vain
General.content: The notion of stuff done in vain is one most visceral to me in what can be related to the tarantula's preaching of equality. That it is possible to work very hard on stuff that doesn't matter for anyone, maybe not even for you. That your intentions sometimes may count for nothing, and utilitarianism wins. That indeed peace of mind, like many other things, may be a choice, and that you may live your life lying strategically, having all the inner workings figured out by yourself and show only the final product to people.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Finding Resonance with the World
General.content: There is this aspect of the self coupling with the environment, whether it be nature or the like. When you are in tune to the world, what it is trying to say, what you are trying to know. You can achieve resonance with the world you live. You can find resonances with places, they catch your spirit and set it free and dancing. Verily they do just that, resonance- they amplify you into heights you haven't heretofore imagined, they allow you to go further and get more spirit, more power of power. There is much advice spoiled and spilled on the world that converges on finding resonances in them, and then exploiting them maximally. Not stopping when one finds one. There is an unstill and untillable, undistilled and undistillable force within. A craving that one with words falls short of covering, and that one should follow like one follows light into a tunnel, a glimmer of hope into the way out of plato's cave and into the real world. An instinctive drive that lets one fearless, flow. Fearless and without narration above all. That is what makes the moment so pure and unnamed and untamed. There is nothing you can write about it to bring you closer to it. There is nothing you can write about it that doesn't destroy it as it is being written. One who recounts the moment or narrates it or describes it cannot be living it. One has to distill the undistillable to pass it on, thus one can't pass but a wrong proxy, a simulacra delta dirac that for only he who truly knows it holds value and holds tremendous value. If people were just to stay shut they would see much beyond what they have lived, they would recognize the heights and the value of the moments that only they had.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as Tool, World as Experience Beyond It
General.content: Language is a tool of thought and communication, but the world as an invention is much older and perfected than it. Your eyes tell you so much that you underestimate just cause you can't put it into words. Your experience goes so much beyond what can even be projected onto and represented by language. If I couldn't write down and contribute to the cult of the overhuman through human's progress, if I couldn't document this journey of the overhuman, then I would just allow myself to experience. To experience reality better than anyone who is already too closed minded to think that the resonances and the coupling was to be made solely through language this new thing.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Saying a Word Ruins the Moment
General.content: There is some very very real sense in which saying a word ruins the moment. You have the temptation to say it to show others you are all on the same page, but it just ruins it. One just had to follow this temptation and label the moment. Not allowing it to grow, not allowing it to be something else, what it wants to be, what it is. Pure is the moment, that it is uncaptured, unfigured out, unsolved in your heart, your heart, you now free spirit, free from the temptation to categorize, free from conquering instead of discovering, the former can always be done, the latter only a seeker, a truthful with a greater will than the last who dared honestly and truthfully to go as far as anyone, you raw likewise resonant coupling untamed beast that no other can put into words or he'll miss you, you now live over the human.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Embracing Incoherence and Open Doors
General.content: You that aren't afraid of being incoherent, you that embrace the pain of not having it all figured out, you that live with all unfigured out. Maybe only you overhuman can figure out everything everywhere all at once. You never cut yourself too short. You always allow room, which is a burden for one to never see the end of things, it is harder than it seems to leave all doors open. One can be consumed by one's freedom, by one's will and reach. One's sense of ignorance and smallness can take over. You thus walk the path of no return, of no returns for you never finish anything, you never erase the possibility of it being necessary in the final great reconstruction and unification of all that you have, or haven't, figured out. the path of progression, of choice, joy you make outta those two, just to complete Ben Goertzel's three principles for life. There is the possibility that the puzzle will tame all doors you opened to be solved, that it takes everything everywhere all at once.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dilemma of the Overhuman
General.content: The dilemma of the Zarathustra, the dilemma of an overhuman, that is solitary, yet isn't understood by the regular human, and the other overhumans solitary too, hardly will the conditions follow that they illuminate one another if they exist. Yet to go to the untruthful human as a famous wise man, or be truthful and crazy.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Everything Fits Only at the End
General.content: A more real sense in which everything is supposed to fit together only at the end. Rest only at the end not in the middle. Its that only after you've gone through it all perhaps are you ready to go through it all over and get the parts that you didn't. Now that you know it you can actually understand it, considering of doing this with this book. Cause if Zarathustra talking to humans or the overhuman talking to humans, they wouldn't understand a thing at first, order is taught, for you learn biases when learning certain things first. You get exposed not to things you understand and get progressively closer to the vision that is being teached but rather you start getting exposed to it and try to hang on and actually start getting it. So at the beginning a lot of what you see in it you don't understand and can only understand after being through other things that that vision has to offer. So technically you can only start to understand the whole thing after ending it. This is my vision. If you're presented with a whole new vision then this is the path to take. Perhaps we cut ourselves super inefficiently short by only reading a book like this once. Perhaps we did 80 percent of the work to get only 20 per cent of the rewards.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- First Hear, Then Resonate
General.content: First hear the sound of the world, only then can you vibrate to its frequency. Only then can you hope to Resonate with it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dance Between Life and Wisdom
General.content: The dance and the day and Zarathustra and his lover life, wisdom his little secret that life may be worried about. Wisdom and life so similar, thus competing.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Silent Grave of Past Moments
General.content: The silent grave of the past of those moments that are constantly being killed.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Who Possessed Whom?
General.content: Who possessed who between you and your moments, and the disloyalty that you both innocently abandon each other.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Smile That Fades
General.content: A smile that dies away at a distance. The most harshest of murders for the moment, for it doesn't get exterminated, but rather fades away, never really dying, never really warning. The death of one and onto the next, this perhaps could really be the most fundamental law of nature and law of life, nature in the wild sense. Outros melhores!

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Playful Spirits of Youth
General.content: The playful spirits that played along with you in those youthful wisdom filled life filled visions that fled with the moment, fled much more thoroughly, much more costly than those of today, which we take easy, but would we that we would grab with teeth and nail those much precious moments that were truly lived. Moments that instead of dying live ferociously. Transcend time. Eternal they were cut short, murdered our innocence, now we can only get a close up, we lack mostly reality. That's what we want to get back. That's my job to live every moment like the overhuman learned from his underhuman child that yet went over and beyond all that humans come to be ripe for. Freedom is interesting to ponder when it was fun to imagine! when you could and were willing to and could afford to throw a day off to some imagination, irrespective of the whole world that wasn't inside your creation. Indifferent to any complications. This people seek, the freedom from complication, but they still only with that fall short of the full child experience. Conserve principles that you long had planted in your heart, and get back to those you have abandoned so they come on even stronger. Everyday is a new day, many people forget that and its consequences.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Will That Survives All Seasons
General.content: The will survives. The will is the all equalizer greatest common divisor. Concurrent and parallel and whole and single. The will stays unentered and only affected on the exterior past the seasons and the weathers. It phases the seasons and seasons the weathers and weathers the storms. Will to life. Will to power. Will of spirit. For too long have we repressed the unholy our will. We have forgotten to live by it. To follow it. We have come to learn to believe more in unreal thing over the ever real will. We need more reality. Find the will. Let it free. Unleash the dangerous controlled will. I will my will, and I will my life and my life wills it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Ancient Wheel Deserving Rediscovery
General.content: Ancient wheel that needs and deserves rediscovery, deserve completeness. Deserves to see the light of day. Deserves to see itself become what it is. Destiny it is to bring about the reality of the most real.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- So Much Death of Moments
General.content: So much death of moments, that at last at least the will may see itself in this life or the next! Unredeemed is the unfree one. One can't be fulfilled unless one is free.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom of Will in Childhood
General.content: It is interesting again to think about freedom in childhood. But are you free? The phrase to put. Here and everywhere. Well the will of the child is free and set free, even if all the rest is imposed onto her, even if she doesn't know any better. She does know better. For over time we trade this life affirming freedom of will for freedom of world where our will isn't free. That is the tradeoff Kaczynski wasn't willing to take. Incompleteness of will is the disease of mankind as it entered human age. And its overcoming is the cure to bring about the overhuman, whose freedom is the most real and powerful.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Brings the Moment to Life
General.content: Will that brings that moment to life. That makes the moment eternal, that saves from the genocide, that transcends time, that outnatures the child.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will to Truth and Freedom
General.content: Will to truth, that is yet unfounded doesn't it come from the naturality of the newborn overhuman. No one who isn't free can be driven by the will to truth to truth.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Godlike Belief, Will, and Action
General.content: Call your will to become that of a God. Let your belief and will and action thus carry themselves to that of a God. Godlike belief with Godlike will and no action is deprivation. Godlike belief with no will is waste.

General.title: Idea: The Competition of Wills and Beliefs
General.content: Again the world is a competition of wills, as much as it is a competition of ideas and beliefs. Who wills it stronger will have it willed. What he wills Stronger will be. Thus will is the passport to freedom. And yet to the privileged slavery of having to act to avoid deprivation. Preachers of equality don't notice the absolute equality of will and its access.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Belief, Will, Action, and Reality
General.content: Things are more possibly real the more they are believed. They become the more real the more they are willed. They are the most real the more they are acted on.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Health vs Performance
General.content: Quotes and questions: health and performance are different things. Is health a part of your performance or your performance a part of your health.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Smooth and Malleable World
General.content: Smooth and malleable do you want the world. Of a computationally to your will efficient you want its material, of malleability to your will, blood of the same blood, comrade do you want it. Visible, and touchable, and changeable do you want it. Willable and thinkable, one which to every activity of yours is lower than you, obeys your overpower over it, it is equal to you in its essence, for then it is conquerable, competable, of a war like kind, and you shall win it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Matter as Mirror of Spirit
General.content: All matter shall be mirror and reflected image of the spirit, says Nietzsche. Mirror for you shall see yourself in it everywhere. Reflected for it shall see you and be according to you.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The World as Big as Your Will
General.content: The world as will and representation. As your entire will. The world is as big as your will allows it to be, it is as big as you will it. It shall be big and yours.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Full Until Intoxication
General.content: Full you want to be, until intoxication, until you get disgusted at this world of so much living it and eating it. You hope for a meal that now challenges you.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Unwise Outsource Their World
General.content: The unwise see life like a river that they ride for fortune, they see it eternal, they underestimate beyond the maximum of the space of daring beliefs their role in the river, their importance, their necessity for its flow, they guard themselves of responsibility, hiding behind the naturalness that the eternal they imagine seems to have. They outsource their world.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Idealizations Needed to Light the Fire
General.content: That with no idealizations you can still light a fire deep within your heart. That shall be your power, that you need no rescue of higher powers, that the very real powers shall be all you need, that yet all the powers shall be what you seek and want. that greatness yet can be measured through your reach, the power of the drives you are able to hold within. The power of your power, your spirit, is the measure of the power which you can hold through those drives that want to escape you, want to be free yet are slaves to your mastery you that exercise control over all that your mind can fathom. The stillness of holding the universe at one fist, above all its an ability of shutting off everything you want. People underestimate how incapable they are of shutting all down. Meditation is the very start where you can let your thoughts go. But people don't understand they can get attached to stuff deeper than passing thoughts, in fact some live a whole life a way that wouldn't be if they could shut off some drives, if they knew themselves and made themselves. You should be a universal instructor and constructor of yourself. You are a universal machine capable of being anything, and a universal constructor capable of building it out whatever it is.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Easy Ways Out of Reality
General.content: There are easy ways out of reality, you can lose it, you can lose grasp of it, hard is to hold all drives still and hold all options open and feel the full power of superposition that your true power implies. Most people would rather collapse their whole into something easier something more graspable by themselves and others, something which can be written, something understandable, something rational, justifiable, not a raw untamed wild beast that goes beyond the projections the mind uses to exercise control, goes beyond the very finite limits tractable to our mind, beyond any language and beyond any program, beyond concepts and conceptions, beyond idea and experience.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Humans as Masters of Making Things Understandable
General.content: Easy ways out are what humans thus have become masters of. We should marvel at the little world we have made for ourselves and our little heads and scopes, and sight and vision. Our greatest masterpiece as a species is that we made something understandable, we picked out the best piece of the world to be understood and relied on.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Lost in Fiction, Against Reality
General.content: One can then get lost in his way out of reality, in his fiction man loses himself, and his fiction talks to him so gently he even turns against the very reality that brought him there. One can start to despise the reality that now takes the form of shadow of a greater cause.

General.title: Idea: On Life Affirmation as Persistent Quality
General.content: Beyond the reality of the world this affirmation of life and the self and the world and the yes saying to all that exists, all that all the more is but a spark, rather a persistent quality, persistent qualities are scarce in a world that at every moment takes from you all that you had that very moment.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Conditions for Greatness Are Disadvantageous
General.content: Conditions for your most fundamental greatness are obviously disadvantageous, if that greatness is truly the motive.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Fortifying Beliefs
General.content: Among those beliefs that self fortify are the belief that power can be attained, can be good, and that all drives can be fulfilled. Fundamentally placing no limit in the power of your being, in how much you can juggle. Everything everywhere all at once. It is possible that it is possible to maximize every drive, and that in fact the pushing of any one drive is independent of any other, that they all add up that they all interfere constructively, however hard may it be.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drives That Are Contrarian and Inaccessible
General.content: Drives those that are as tested as much as they are contrarian, inaccessible. Those that language or program treat poorly, in modernity or in humanity. Yet find no reason to ditch the easy ones that most already have. There is no further merit to contrarian than that it can work

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Stretching the Soul Through Extreme Drives
General.content: Through extreme drives and opposites stretching the soul Pushing its limits. So that one may produce beyond what was already produced. The more these elastic drives are pushed together the greater the potential and the greater the flight when they get released.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Valuations as Arbitrary Self-Fulfilling Principles
General.content: That valuations as arbitrary as the self fulfilling principles of power sometimes carry people away, they thus drift by the hands of power of else who's.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Will on the River of Becoming
General.content: "Your will and your values have you placed on the river of becoming." you bet your values on yourself. You bet your power on your power. You are a mixture of what it is that you bet in and what it is that those who bet on you are.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Choose With Whom You Cross the River
General.content: You choose with whom you cross the river. With your becoming or someone else's being.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Always Win: The Meta-Belief
General.content: My brother ruben said hypnosis- win, I always win. What if you are crazy enough to believe you always win? That is advantageous, if of course you still learn from your mistakes, you simply have the meta belief that whatever happens was still a win in the long run. That makes you keep up the pace, never letting go for you are in a winning position and keep it must be. You never have reason to be let down, you always go into the next moment as a winner shall you be.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- They Can Have the Recipe
General.content: They can have the recipe but they can't make the sauce. They see a very distilled and to their world compressed view, a shallow projection of the immensity of your will they can't grasp. At the deeper level they can't read your will. You must make that so. It should be so yours as so not of the world and of everyone and be written in a language so yours and not of the world and be about something so yours that only you shall will it. Your will is yours to will it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Make Every Will Descend from Yours
General.content: Make every will descendent of your mother will their master! Make the boats thus go behind you that go with that much more force now. Make every will of the world be such to strengthen yours. It should be that you believe all of those wills are here just to push yours forward, just so you develop yours the longer, and see for it a greater dimension than intuition alone would dare imagine. Conquer them then overcome them, incorporate every will that has already been worked out by those of the past into your arsenal. Master

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Will to Power Is Your Danger
General.content: Your will to power is your danger, for it is undeniable and unstoppable and real. That which cannot exhaust, that which isn't finite or bound, limited or encapsulated. That which no box can cover, no tingling can't turn around, that for which no price can be attributed or negotiated, that which the finite, the bound and limited, the encapsulated, cannot corrupt.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Way of All Living
General.content: The way of all living and the all way of living. The latter's understanding is a way of reaching the former, in its full understanding. intuition built a la deep learning, namely with representation, and little tidbits of symbolic aspects that you attach to it allows you to see things before even working them out, you already saw the existence of the idea before you made it out. I noticed this happened with writing and also with algebra as in seeing a possible way of writing a complex expression.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Read Beyond Words
General.content: Look at all that people tell you, not just what comes out of their mouth. I mean this and the less ambitious version that you really see what they tell you, what they communicate explicitly, not just implicitly through actions, but also explicitly through their eye and expression. One hell of a potent cheat code that you could expand your language, for hearing the way of the world and for expressing your way. The world opens to you if you know how to talk to it. Yet through this master the art of while having the language of everything not collapsing stuff into it, having the ability to thus hear what is not even there, that is an even greater step. And make your language evolve in the process that you read something that your language doesn't have, which implies that you got it outside of that language. if language can dictate thinking then you want the filter to be as little disruptive as possible, you want to be able to accommodate in your language all that there is yet be able to see it outside of your language. Thus you converge at reality from the direction of Seeing itself pure with no words to put on what you see, and put words ever closer to the pure that you destroyed at the start.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Quantum Collapse of Language
General.content: There is a suspiciously similar dynamic in this characterization of the world and the measurement with collapse in quantum mechanics. You cannot put words on something without destroying what it was. Not even see it, nor any interaction with it. You can never contain the world in which you live, the world. This is the escape for reality. That it can only be perceived without register, without trace,

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as Sufficient for Freedom
General.content: For some the world is big enough and possibly language big enough that all it takes for them is that they keep experiencing new things, which can be expressed with the farther reaches of that language which expands the usual. novelty can be obtained alone from language. And is that not freedom that it lets us express the greatest and greater things. It lets us experience that. And a shared world that we were condemned to is better shared if we can also share, through language, all that we can express about it. If we make that language public people will meet you at that level. For some joy choice and progress is obtained through language alone. Just so you understand that if language was all there ever was we'd be good to go and win the world

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Language as the Huxley Tape
General.content: Just so you understand with language alone you could win the world and express and experience everything. The huxley machine, the huxley tape could be made out of language. This duality of the convergence of the limit is at the base of simulacrum and simulation, red pill and blue pill.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Living Are Stuck to Their Gift
General.content: Yet the living are in a sense stuck. They got the gift of existence, they are bound to it and its creator.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Slave Only to Your Own Will
General.content: So it seems the solution to this every man is a slave to something issue is precisely being a slave only and only of your own will. One and only with your will. So losing all your freedom to the escape to your freedom. That the way of the living is a way of obedience. This aligns with there being no free will. It means that there is always a will, whether yours or another's. You can will your wills but not will what you will, said Schopenhauer. There is no free man in the strong sense perhaps, let there be at least in the weak sense that you choose your will, and let it be yours. so Gil's hierarchy of freedom- you can choose your will among the available, then you can choose your will in that you make it, so you go from deciding a posteriori to a priori, and then you are free from wills, something that Nietzsche hasn't mentioned and is my task to develop. For that last transition you gotta first be owner of all wills, slave to none. Only then can you live without them that they have made you rise over the free human. The over free human. Free from wills, here we dive.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Free from Wills: Loving Your Creations to Freedom
General.content: Free from wills means free from the love you have towards what you create. Your creations become independent even though you created. Dirac delta's start flying everywhere, that you so much love something to make it come alive, thus you bless it with the game of life, yet so fast you overcome it and not let it stall you, thus you both escape and play the game of life.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Information Quality and the Expert's Presence
General.content: We also get a simulacrum condition of the convergence of the limit when talking about the quality of information you get at the personal aspect. What would be higher quality? A lecture by Cohen-Tannoudji with him alone and the blackboard or him with slides? Of course empowerment through slides is more efficient, but all of a sudden you can have someone who doesn't know anything taking advantage of the slides, whereas Cohen-Tannoudji would still give a quality lecture without them. So for the maximum output you want both the information in an accessible way, so accessible that you may think you'd rather just take it at home while you eat, where you can go at your speed, but you also want the person to be in total domination of the material, and have great questions and answers, but if the material is good enough it simply is better than the person talking, for it took perhaps days of work from that person to put down. So you get unreality yet reality that you believe Cohen-Tannoudji is credible.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Know When to Leave
General.content: Like in everything, you gotta know when to leave. In the casino, when you are figuring something out. Rather leave it just not totally complete than fill it and take away from yourself the opportunity to complete it. Be of the use of time, many people want to finish something right after starting it, not realizing the power to retrieve from letting time pass and coming back to it different, that is what makes it more complete in reality, and big things can be build by consistent coming back to it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Human Progress as More Possibilities
General.content: Human progress was always in the way of more possibilities, well invention is just that so not much surprise there. But we forget many inventions. Those that are so obvious we forget, to the point that we may not even remember they are inventions. Language. The concept of a lie, which had to be invented and we gained power and possibility through it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Many Won't Want to Command
General.content: And many a people won't want to command, won't want to let go of that which enslaves them. A sort of stockholm syndrome on a smaller scale. Many people are just fine with obeying, even if others, let alone commanding, even the more others.

General.title: Idea: [NEEDS TITLE — Sunday, 18 May 2025 13:31:39]
