General.content: Commanding takes really that you expose yourself, that you allow yourself to be object of obeying, that you go one to many hand to hand. That you must gather the multiplicity within to take on multiple people at the same time, this is one way to grow tall, to be equivalent to many, physically mentally linguistically. Commanding yourself the more multiplicity it yields, for for all yous you have to battle with. Both go to war with side by side, but also be able to take on every last one of them at once, thus you form your strongest self, which in risk and experiment, by winning can only be the one commandant of all the squad and all the forces that you are. There you must reach.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Self-Play and Internal Evolution
General.content: Thus one gets to this self play self paced conception of progress within. Evolutionary selection at your pace that can far exceed others's ability to even comprehend.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Core, Hidden from Others
General.content: And how could others interfere with this internal judge and internal battles and internal evolution that they can't see, they who see only the winning commander, and mostly don't even see him? This is your core, that you stick to, and that lives beyond the selves with others that you have.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Law of the Strongest and Life as Master
General.content: Nietzsche puts forward this explanation that the law of the strongest being the master of the weaker comes from everyone and not only the strongest let alone the stronger. That even the strongest yields to life itself its master. That all the both weaker and stronger to something serve the stronger and endorse this yielding so that they can be masters of the weaker. Thus one plays this game of life. Thus life is obeying, that Nietzsche puts great emphasis in having figured out. Even the greatest, and precisely because that coined term makes only sense for those who play this game, is still slave to something, hasn't escaped his slavery to life itself. On the one hand it makes some sense for the master of the game to keep playing the game by being itself a slave, but symmetrically to all others, thus the argument extends.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Induced Order for Progression
General.content: This is the induced order from only which a progression can be made out of. One thus axiomatically builds the requisites of life.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Playing with Death: Beyond Life
General.content: And so the greatest which has risen through and throughout, he plays with death, for everything is left is to escape life. People have this conception of death as dying and waking up in another place. That is the kind of that that he who has mastered all but life can now master. Free from wills. People don't know if he who was born outta life can go beyond it, can be independent of it, nobody knows whether really. They don't know if a god can be made outta man. They don't know if this life of ours can be escaped. If one can stop playing the game of life without that killing him not just in life but everywhere. Can one play another game. Can one detach from mother nature that brought him.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Master's Game and Hierarchical Emergence
General.content: That yet the master may give much freedom to its slave, the masterness is more so that the slave plays the game of the master, not that inside it it can't do whatever it wants, and hold enslaved others as master too. And so to life it is even more ungrateful and even more shocking that one would transcend it that allows you to master everything, as long as you keep playing its game. It allows you to be master of all wills and even free from wills. Thus the universe would stand in shock that one would even do it. So sometimes you play other's games because you don't know better. thus bosses make their game out of their employees who don't know they can be bosses too. yet the autonomy between scales, in this hierarchical structure of emergent games, (software in the natural world- a computational approach to hierarchical emergence informational closure, that you can compress different scales as their own autonomous systems, that within them you can compress, which is to say, correctly model from the data of that scale alone and causally connect the objects of that scale.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Purpose Through the Master-Slave Order
General.content: Maybe a purpose can only be introduced through the ordering of master slave. That thus master and slave need each other. They feed off each other. That through ordering one has place to go, namely over and beyond, and that can be the purpose of not our life but life itself.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- One Is Struggle and Conflict of Purposes
General.content: One is struggle and thus others struggle to understand you. One is a struggle but a becoming says Nietzsche. Yet one is also a conflict of purposes he adds. That your soul stretches to many sides makes you more indecipherable. They will never know which principle you will invoke. You are always anew. If you had a clear and public or mappable traceable purpose it could be used against you. Thus in the unspoken ununderstood way to over and beyond you are unpredictable. And purely random, in the limit, so absolutely impregnable, intractable, unattackable, do you become when you become free from wills. You are yourself more than anyone is themselves for your whole is all you are, you are unmistakable exactly for your untraceability. Either you are or you are not.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Love Something Enough to Free It
General.content: For if you love something sufficiently enough you will bless it with freedom, you will perhaps assist with not knowing where it came from, that it may not shed shadow on where it can grow. Your most precious creations you don't want to put your fingerprint on not to damage them. Thus god raised the universe and disappeared at once.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The World Is Transactional
General.content: There is no good and evil at all beyond that which at a given moment keeps one moving. The world is transactional, and nothing to you is given. Nothing at any moment is telling you something. You make it all up for your own benefit, just don't get permanently attached to things that you gave yourself. At every moment your intention decides what gets to keep living and what doesn't.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be Afraid of Nothing, Even Harsh Truths
General.content: Be afraid of nothing, even harsh truths, we had already gotten there previously. Now silenced truths become toxic, says Nietzsche. If others have seen more of these than you, if you shied away from one of these that may come to haunt you, it may present as weakness on you, that you are not capable of realizing it. That certain smell gets you away. Yet no smell ought to get you away, you have battled all evil, none of it can intimidate you.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Elephants in the Room Grow
General.content: The elephants in the room grow ever more the longer they are unaddressed. Unchecked. Unbalanced. If you don't check the prisoner evil is inside its cell, if you don't gather yourself to look at it, it may have already escaped. It may have already latched onto to other things unknowingly. With these evils you want to tame them, contain them, and isolate them, that they may be yours and never something of you be theirs.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Mysteries: What Makes You Top-Performing
General.content: This is what makes you abnormal and top performant. Is that there are no mysteries. While for others there are ever more mysteries that they don't see the process and only the magic, for you it is all clear, you've seen it all.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hard Core with No Form
General.content: The image you want to have is that of a hard core that can either be absolutely still or teeming with the greatest form of life. When it comes down to it, be built out of building blocks that are like water, they can flow or they can crash. That hard as anything core that is unbreakable precisely cause it has no form.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Everyone Sees Themselves at the Center
General.content: Everyone sees the world through them being at the center. Everyone sees things in such a way that they who see it are the balanced ones. Thus when an author for example tries to add something to knowledge with his own thing, trying to fit it in the wheel and make it correct for him, even tho he tried to have the complete theory with him adding his own bit and yet having the balance to connect everything, people reading will want to associate him much more with just the bit he added, making him a champion of it, and they themselves as the balanced ones who now incorporate that into the whole.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- He Who Has a Why, He Who Has a How
General.content: That he who has a why to live can bare anyhow. But also that he who has a how to live can bare any why, said Jonathan Bi probably from someone else too.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- In Secret the Overhuman Is Born
General.content: Thus in secret the overhuman is born. But it shall not be explained for now. Singularity.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Capable of All Disorder, Master of Stillness
General.content: Be capable of all disorder, yet as much capable of shutting it all down and be still. May no wild beast be able to wreck your focus. That you be able to handle all chaos and everything everywhere all at once. Maybe you overcome those beasts, not avoid them. May you not be withdrawn from the full experience there is.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Apply Tension, Then Let Go
General.content: You gotta be able to apply tension to control it all, yet let yourself go with the most random of flows. Tense yourself too early, and tensing means you come back to your core, that all other modes of movement don't roll with you, and you may be losing on a lot. Be able to be super flexible and extend the soul in all directions, yet at all times knowing you could control it all. There is more power to knowing you can do stuff than people realize. The counterfactual world truly has consequence in the so called real world. If you know how something would go if you did it, you may not be bound to it, you may be free to think other things, you don't have to go ahead and confirm. If you already saw the end of the line through one path, you may not need to follow it if you see it has not great value. You may have greater pace of executing and operating inside your head, that your mental model of others for example can run faster than themselves, even tho there is some component that you don't learn because you didn't get the randomness of the real world.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Withdrawn from Valueless, Not from Unknowing
General.content: You want to be Withdrawn from parts of the world without value, not without knowing.

General.title: Idea: [NEEDS TITLE — Tuesday, 3 June 2025 22:05:29]
General.content: Que gostos nao se discutem, mas que a vida é sobre disutir gostos, that all life is disputing over taste and tasting says Nietzsche. life as the battle of wills presents no more than the subjective to be discussed. Because it isn't discussed says the proverb, can you discuss it without hearing anyone. Because no one can take away from you your wills, for they are totally subjective. You can actually have them and change them and see where they lead you, whereas in non willed things you progress onto something, which is good but isn't generator of time evolution, rather it sets the time we are in.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Hungry Lion Is Stronger
General.content: That a hungry lion is stronger. This idea that when you are stripped of what you want you want it that much more and you are more ferocious and able to tap into a primal nerve that propels you. Make it yours this drive. All of the food for thought and food and food of good that enters you you must burn it to keep yourself from the mindstate of the content.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Choice Is About Taste
General.content: And all choice is about taste and tasting after all.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Taste as the Weight and Measure
General.content: Nietzsche says taste is the weight and what weighs. Is it the measure and the measured. The compared and the source of comparison. It is that by which you judge things, that they can be judged means they are tastes of some form, and at the same time the value of your own, that is only your own if it is your judgment, your taste.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Becoming Free of Shadow
General.content: Become free of shadow. No shadow for you have lived with it and now it is nothing, it is part of you, it is not any longer a shadow of variable size that can seem like a monster when its a tiny rabbit. That you turn away from yourself and conquer the dark lands of your shadow, not just the unconscious, but the conscious shadow, that which you consciously put away, that which can't stand and you thus send to the far and cold, brief and loud domain of the shadows. You conquer those lands and nothing from it can now sparkle unrest. Fear it you may, but fundamental confidence you have to walk those your terrains. A step to free from wills is to be free from tastes. To grab them all and in the same way let them go. To become spectator to them, in control. Rationalize them, as in they are no more than a fact you confirm or disconfirm, not a thing that sparkles your need of them, oo the power of normalization. Some people give halos to normalization, normalizing your victories, moving on fast. Yet it is much too, that is also much, about leaving no stone unturned, and no what ifs unrealized. Knowing the possibilities, not casting some shadow or some divine light at some things.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Tastes vs Wills
General.content: Tastes as one knows can be much more superficial yet unconscious than wills, those intentional beasts, that yet can run so deep into your being. Taste decides for you many things, or rather your taste of something gets many of its features before you even taste it. Free from taste means you've seen it all that your mind comprehends, having no part of your mind left uncomprehended, so that no projection from above or rising of a shadow from the depths could corrupt the experience. But actually this is the part that you comprehend you comprehend. I feel one shouldn't shy away from, which again brings the self referential paradox, having one part of the mind totally unknown, that is part of wanting to know more, is that you have something that doesn't quite make the whole thing perfect. There must be always something getting on the way, a little mosquito that ruins the moment yet gives you space to taste it right there and there about, that doesn't quite allow you to say you've got it all. That keeps you moving.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Still Bits of Despising
General.content: There is still bits of despising, that means his body hasn't yet developed the enzymes to treat anyhow, weakness. One becomes neutral, then one develops tastes anew, whose fire shows only truth brought about by neutrality.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Normalization
General.content: Normalising allows above all to get stuff done, to not think of the upcoming moment as holy, thus one doesn't have to pray to it, or hear music to reach an elevated mental state which can just fall below baseline after he gets away from that moment. It allows you to move past and get more. If you know deep down you want something, this lack of celebration in the middle, this lack of rest in the middle, won't harm your will.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Removing the Inherited Filters
General.content: There are still some filters to be taken out from the inside of your mind. Some conceptions, they call it preconceptions, because it wasn't this your being now present who decided upon them, it was thrown into you, whether by external things or even by previous versions of you. Free yourself from the stuff that previous versions of you used for their own sake. Do not confuse yourself with this, open your mind. Open your mind means opening the doors that you haven't opened, pressing the buttons that you haven't, and understanding your mind, picking apart its parts.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Rest Until You Know
General.content: Don't rest until you know it and be at the end all be all.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Preacher of the Earthly and the Normal
General.content: And how advantageous is it to be a preacher of that which is all consistent, the earthly, the normal. No need for anything abnormal. You can rise over and beyond this world through all normality.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Fairness of the Lived Moment
General.content: If there is further fairness and equality in this world is in that the moment is lived. There is really no memory in that you may have crossed all 7 layers of hell right before being born into a moment, you are all the same. All the like the same. This can be taken advantage of, that you truly can go through these layers, head down, consciousness of if you so please and only awaken in the other side. You cannot trade now for later. Either you grab something now or never. Now or never, ever. If in doubt flat out. No saving now will increase your later output. That is always the same lie.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Withdrawn: Believers in Time's Extension
General.content: Withdrawn are many a people, deprived by themselves, that they believe in extensions of time. That they believe something like the past exists, that they believe they have much power over themselves in the future. Withdrawn from their fullest expression. There is only to add, nothing can ever diminish you now or ever.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Soul of the Bull
General.content: The soul of the bull pushing in all directions and ragely so, ragely at that which he cannot control, which still gives him power and control over what he controls. Yes he focus so much on what he can control that he leverages what he cannot for it use the rage against the minimum thing that has been given to you that yet you believe won't change, like the finiteness of life or whatever. Yet precisely through what those fortunes that have been handed to you you can be grateful of the cards you are handed, you can recognize opportunity.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom in Present-Moment Adaptability
General.content: There is much freedom in adaptability, in present moment to moment adaptability. Being able to carry all the past and the future within, yet being able to let go of all of it, be here now and change direction, and then succeed in the new avenue you find yourself in. That is survival, power and freedom.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Making Time Stand Still
General.content: With the cards you are handed don't neglect the power of making time stand still. That you have nothing you can do for example. That maybe your train is 5 hours late and you are in the middle of nowhere, with only your thoughts and maybe something to immortalize them, a pen and paper for example. No rush, no duty, you have it right now, free time.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Illusions About Time
General.content: Have no illusions about your time here on earth and otherwise. If something got delayed you didn't win time, you may have even lost it if you adapt yourself to that new time. The time on earth is finite and if you lose days you are doing just that, losing, the count on the days here won't increase, it never does.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Winning From Others' Frustrations
General.content: And of what you can't control and off of delays and things that mess up life you can actually win by pulling on other's frustrations to move ahead, you see their reaction and you smell blood in the water, you go win.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Stockholm Syndrome with Lies
General.content: It feels that even after lies are dismantled people still waste time believing them, some sort of stockholm syndrome mixed with bias for what you previously believed, attachment.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Delusionality Has Power
General.content: Delusionality, there is power in it. Building a mystique around yourself, it goes along with it. For example this belief I now share with you, helper, even if obviously untrue for some. That I see the people who watch my instagram stories and believe they all see it, even people I thought wouldn't, and those to whom I don't correspond by also seeing theirs, I believe they see it as support, they know I'm the one and they believe in me, they look to see if I have already become all that they saw in me to be.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Memoryless World, Memoryless You
General.content: Memoryless this world is and memoryless should you be, not letting yourself be shadowed by your deed, nor your eye by the vision you developed.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Being Active with Your Investments of Time
General.content: Being active with your investments, always controlling that which can either be controlled by you or you have no control over. That means when given 5 minutes starting to read, willing and prepared to read for 5 hours if the train doesn't arrive.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Knowing Others' Wills to Win
General.content: Fierce the world is. and the more you know about others's wills and intentions, the more you can see through their game, the more you can predict them and control them, the more you can push and go through them to go further and win. If you see someone in a group who is only there for the girls and not for you, you can quickly recognize it and act on it. Cause to take away someone's power you have to know what they want to do with it, what they seek in that power, what power they seek. You can submit them, and furthermore you can do it without them knowing of that, you don't have to scream you won, mostly that only diminishes you

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Memorylessness
General.content: And the belief of memorylessness simply has power. You spend less time in shaky terrains, that past and future. You get to find more opportunities in the present, you get to make more, you only use past as long as it cavoes you now, through past win for example, you are unaffected by your loses and get to go with maximum confidence now when it matters.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All This World Is a Dispute of Trying
General.content: All this world is a dispute of trying and all your wins are about trying

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Live Under a Rock
General.content: Don't let yourself live under a rock. You don't feel it but can see in other people that it is sad, that one lives masked from truth, that one self restricts and withdraws even if not knowingly. Now there are many rocks one can live under. In many of them you should live under, we are here talking about that which matters. Many distractions would better be used dissolving in air than getting inside your rock

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Pushing Through Others' Reactions
General.content: And there are my explicitations of this thing of pushing through others reaction to thing one doesn't control. Like seeing them complain. That can only give you more power to move and go get it. It can only fuel your fire. Its almost like you team up with what brings those bad events.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Beauty From Tamed Beasts
General.content: Beauty one can argue comes when the greatest beasts are tamed. Still is made out of the fervent waters.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Stop When Full
General.content: That one shouldn't stop when one is full, that actually one should never allow oneself to get full, only when beauty is acquired says Nietzsche, sometimes your goal is way past feeling full. Sometimes force feeding becomes necessary, push through complacency. Memorylessness helps with this aspect of exploding at every moment.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drifting Beyond the Human
General.content: And beyond the human all too human you move. Bit by bit we drift away from being human, further into doing things humans didn't thought possible

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hero Fails at Beauty
General.content: But the hero fails at beauty that he needs to use his will and muscle, being able to keep it all down. As normal. As human. Gracious and constrained power to win her heart, beauty the hardest of givers.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Descent of Gracious Power Is Beauty
General.content: the descent of gracious power into the visible is the beauty says Nietzsche. Only you can control that power. That makes it yours. But being so on it that it is gracious and even letting it be touched by others that can't have it, that is the beauty. Yes that is the value everyone can get, thats whats called beauty, neverminding that the commander of that power experiences the greatest value, even if only he can seize it.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Environment and Friends Change Your Mind
General.content: Your environment very much influences you, we know that. Now one very specific case is if you are with friends. Literally your thoughts change. If you are reading a book instead of just thinking on it or other things half of your brain will have thoughts relevant to conversation with the friends. You can focus as much. One small brainrot by one and now all descend spiralling into fun.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Power Is What Gives Graciousness Its Rarity
General.content: But with no power behind it to back it up, with no capability of violence and all evil, graciousness is default, there is no beast to tame, there is no scarcity, everyone can get it, no one can reach over and beyond.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Why People Find Beautiful Things Harmless
General.content: That is why people find things beautiful harmless, they see by definition only the toned down tamed gracious fire of the beast, they see nothing what it is capable of. They don't understand its power nor its strength, nor of it nor of its master.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Bigger the Ascent, the Bigger the Descent
General.content: The bigger the ascent, the bigger the descent, the bigger risk of being thrown way at the gradients and into the easy roll to evil, evil facilitates its entrance, it always has the door open, and the door stares ever harder at you each step you take upwards over and beyond the human. At some point you go pass the clouds, humans are lost down there, you are born anew without them, without knowing them, being only something else entirely.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Never Limit Yourself
General.content: Never limit yourself. There is always an option. People don't think on first principles. There are many soft limits before the hard limit. Exploit them.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Living in the Future
General.content: That in the movement of the going over and beyond and descending into humans, the going under one travels far in time. You start to live in the future for you predict, for you control what was, you have a grip on past and present, a la orwell you reach the future before it reaches you, for you anticipate and live around there and get yourself familiar with it. It's advantage. When all others arrive you already own the place and know it much better than everyone else. You are the future. And if you see it you can measure it and can build it. You can steer.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Laughing at the Present From the Future
General.content: That laughing uncontrollably may be the reaction of a being so far ahead to us. A human of the future could only laugh at us. Where would he start? A being ahead of us that yet hasn't come from us won't even see us, won't even get our presence, will be in so many dimensions and in so greater of a dimension as to render us useless. But one who gets our presence, namely that human of the future, could only laugh at that presence. Our inefficiencies, our blunders, the things we don't see and realize, the wrong beliefs... Perhaps to laugh further at the project of mankind beyond its present manifestation. To laugh at the idea that it was people from this present world that built the future world, yet that they went so over and beyond the human all too human to make that future come to life and that present come to life. the same as internally in your life. You will laugh at yourself of the present so bad, and those who haven't climbed and only see the product of the descent, the final beauty, those to whom you disappeared as you ventured beyond the clouds, to them it will be such a discontinuity that they can't believe it is still you, cause it isn't, and that is actually the greatest argument of truth for the above thought experiment.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Own Face as the Best Mask
General.content: That there is no better masks for those of the present than their own faces. You are already as unrecognizable as it gets. This says Nietzsche. And as unrecognizable for unlike masks it doesn't hide, it shows, and to others it clearly shows its not you, masks could actually introduce some doubt.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Overhuman of the Distant Future
General.content: This is the overhuman of that distant future, with no signs, that they have been covered up of that of the past. The put together human that with its voice brings to ears all people, and with his gesture and motion brings together all of the past, yet none of it specifically, hence unrecognizable. Time itself.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Time Traveller's Present
General.content: And for that person living in the future it takes intentional directed effort to have an eye for the people of the present too. To also enjoy that present as if there is no tomorrow. There is no tomorrow. Even when you have a home live in the future. Verily a time traveller in this sense one could be. One doesn't find just a sufficing home in the past nor present.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Man Who Hasn't Escaped the Past
General.content: That the man who lived in the present hasn't yet escaped all the past that takes form through him, all institutions that the past has made to habit his mind. He has his mind rent free. He is stuck to being human. He is stuck to his ancestors and his genes. He hasn't become his own being yet. The free timeless being, he who can not be like those of the past and follow their suit. He who can be something totally anew. Unseen. Uncaptured by the past. Unfull at the present. Just by looking at his present you can't contain him, can't know him, can't understand him. you are not written in the past. You are the first of your kind, and a legend that will not be born again.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Whose Taste Is Stronger Wins the Future
General.content: Now whose taste is stronger. Whose future is more wanted by he who wants. Whose future can he convince everyone to join. If they do then that future is right here.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Not Just a Transition Between Beliefs
General.content: You don't just want to be a transition between beliefs. Just the carrier of the old ones, and carrier of the future ones that are thrown your way. Incapable of belief Nietzsche says. Having it all inherited, not being able to see beyond what is. You really live in the present, you actual unpunctualized kings of actuality (contemporaneity). You really only have this block right here.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Belief in Belief
General.content: Nietzsche says all that ever created something had belief in belief. Only then can you live in the future. Believing on your belief and in belief itself. Only he who believes in belief can believe. Can only have vision if you have vision for vision itself.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Making Up for Parents in Children
General.content: Nietzsche says "in my children I want to make up for being the child of my parents, and in all future- for this present." so you didn't earn the gift of life, but you can give it to others. And you also didn't earn the gift of being able to give of life to others, that becomes as much a gift to yourself as a cost to your gift.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Root Yourself as Deep as Possible
General.content: That one must root his self as deep as possible, for in case of failure the deepest, the very root is what comes out. When there is no thinking allowed or projection to the future or hope or feeling what comes out is the raw essence.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Believe Yourself or Always Lie
General.content: "whoever does not believe himself always lies." the idea that you are always right in your belief, that you cannot have wrong beliefs. That is the belief around belief. So believe the highest. Not believing in yourself is a waste of time, whatever you believe in.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Earth's Skin and Its Diseases
General.content: That the earth has a skin and the skin has diseases, one of them humans. This says Nietzsche. And that disease is contagious, that it may spread to other skins. The whole universe may get infected.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Events Need Not Be Loud
General.content: That great events need not be loud. That people hide depth by being in muddy waters. That real deepness makes sound hard to reach the surface. Hard to make an explosion from the depths.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Volume of the Depths
General.content: And if you wanna talk great events with great consequences, its those that add up, the many, the people, thats who most orders. (quem mais ordena). Not the one time where you had the perfect conditions. Not the one time where everything fit together. The loudest and singular. The volume of the depths is greater than the sparks of the heights. Immersing oneself, becoming the permanent self you want to be far outreaches what you are in that one afternoon where you fucking went for it. if you espremeres (don't know in english) a volcano some power will come out, you will feel its intensity through the burn, some gas and some rocks will travel far. But if you espremeres the ocean, the sheer still power that sits there doesn't compare. Comes out much more. In that journey to the future its not noise that moves time, noise simply signals, values, says Nietzsche, make the world go round. and the implanting of these values doesn't announce itself. One plants his values in the very silence that allows others to think they kept their values, to think they have power over them. You don't want to announce change. You don't want to announce that the world moved, that you moved the world.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Move with the World or Be Left Behind
General.content: Yet you want to move with the world as it moves. Always be able to do that. You must understand the movement of the world, you get behind, you can't move it anymore. To be moving the limits you must be right at the edge, pushing that wall. To move them you in fact must be ahead at least while you move it. and it will no doubt be a different world. They say the young change the world. They have energy which fuels its movement around, its time translation, and you will see some, usually the old, unable to keep the pace of change. Initially they won't realize it, for for some they are just doing what they, even if unknowingly were always doing, following others values. But it becomes flagrant when you look at the world and you simply can't understand it. There is a disconnect. You are living in a past version. Just a matter of time to when that past version will no longer be compatible with the current software, and it won't be possible to survive in the current. sometimes you look at old people looking at everyone on the screen. Some reading, some doing work, some playing games, some consuming content. It is sad to look at them looking, they are out of place, they don't realize the power of these things if steered in the right direction, they stick to what they've been taught by people who knew less and are already dead.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Pace of Change Accelerates
General.content: Now the pace of change just keeps on increasing, the world moves faster, but they are still moving at the pace of change of years ago. They move slow, they just vibrate in a different frequency. The pace of change relative to the eventually reaches escape velocity, to where they simply can't catch up. Thats when you die. Not die, but have your time counted. Now you can consider yourself mortal. There is this thing about dead people, that they exert so much power over the present ones at times. Sometimes you are bounded by things they said. Maybe they said don't touch this. And you never did. But now they are not here and you never understood why you couldn't touch it. Maybe someone before them told them that. Just like knowledge spreads over generations, so does error and mistake. Even with values and tastes, we sometimes hear people of the past to know what is interesting, what is important. We may be learning in school a subject that is deemed important because the people who studied it thought so, and they are dead long ago and nobody really understood the topic but them.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Make Moves Forever, Not Just Big Moves
General.content: So strive to not only make big moves on the world, making things that last forever, but better making moves forever, being forever in the limit changing the world.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Enjoy While Sharp
General.content: Enjoy while you are sharp. Maybe forever. But enjoy it if in your case it won't be forever. Use it to the maximum of its ability. Some people absolutely waste it doing old human things.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Events Take Time to Develop
General.content: Great events also may take some time to develop, to travel through all layers of your awareness and consciousness. You only notice you were born anew some time after. You can't pinpoint a date, you can't pinpoint a discontinuity, it is all continuous yet it amounted to all this many change.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Rush Against Time Is the Most Against Nature
General.content: And the most against nature thing you could do is to want to rush time, as in be afraid of it, be avoidant of it, rather than enjoy it to the fullest and be fine with having infinite time to do whatever you are doing now. If being trapped in time scares you, you are enslaved. Amidst the inevitability of time that is the most worthless pursuit. You get stressed and tired pushing against an immovable wall. Time is he who you spend the most, so make it your friend. The most time. The most anything.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Stalling Belief That All Is the Same
General.content: The stalling belief that all is the same, that is the true depressing nihilism, the one that says that nothing can ever be different. Of course this is the case for a very large scale of the universe, but clearly at the scale of life, the power that keeps the world turning is that there is better. There is better to be done and achieved.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Breaking of Injectivity Kills
General.content: The breaking of injectivity, things being in vain, that's what kills. Thats what stops.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Blind Man Given Eyes
General.content: That the blind man who is given his eyes back will be mad at him who made him see the horrors of this world. If you open the mind of someone to them to see the reality, they may curse you. Escaping the matrix is not for everyone. Not everyone can take it. People have different points of failure, some have weak egos, fragile selves, wrapped in fragile narratives. Some can't take knowing some harsh raw truths out there.

General.title: Idea: With New Values: What Comes Next?
General.content: With the foundation of new values, what comes? What are the consequences of seeing past good and evil? One such consequence is doubt of what the people deem great human beings. That is put into question.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Boring Nature of Some Things Is Inevitable
General.content: another inevitability people laughably get themselves mad over and lose opportunity from is the boring nature of some things. A flight will be boring for everyone, whether you are watching your favorite show or reading a tough philosophical text. Everyone will suffer, you decide whether that suffering is going to take you somewhere. You will suffer regardless.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Glimpses of the Already but Unrealized Future
General.content: And one that is living in the already but all unrealized future sees only glimpses of it. Sees shadows and fragments. These things that yet haven't aligned to his vision cause discomfort, discomfort that pushes one to move the wall. He gets hints, as it were signs, of what he can be. That future talks to him.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Let Life Interpret the Dream
General.content: Let your life itself interpret that dream that you as of yet can't understand totally, for it comes from the future that you are living in but not where you are at, that same life which is the consequence of your dream.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Only You Kept Up With Yourself
General.content: Now on the way to overhuman through that dream and living in the future the only one that kept up with you is yourself. Thus you develop a special distinguished relation with yourself. One that treats you as all too different than the human all too human

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Afraid of Heights, Comfortable with the Ground
General.content: We get scared of heights, of seeing where we can fall, instead of being scared of the bottom, where we feel the comfort of having a permanence, that bottom from which we can't descend further. that happens if you are always looking down. But if you are living in the future and always up higher, always seeking higher, the permanence it is the ground that scares you, that it seems inhuman to be able to climb so much. Paradoxically it is the inhuman endeavor of climbing it that makes it easier.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Look Where You're Going, Not Down
General.content: The precipice says Nietzsche, let alone the ground. That in which you don't look where you are falling. To actually move you want to look where you are going. If for the stars you are shooting there you should look. Looking downwards while trying to go up doesn't work. Looking and living the human while trying to overcome it won't work. Looking at other humans that aren't shooting for the skies, or looking at places other than skies, can only give your more will to go up and to the stars and to not look if you live among them, remember still of what is up there. Remember you are being seen from up there and there you go.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Consciousness and Waking Up to War
General.content: Quotes and questions: the consciousness is the first and most fundamental thing that defines a human. Without your consciousness you are rendered useless. it is also what makes the overhuman overhumanness. Get me out of my consciousness and you may just have a chance of taking my freedom away. Like in the ufc. Then you may have a chance of winning. and waking up is that process, and you should be able to wake up at any point of your sleep cycle right away born into war. 0-100 or actually 0 to 1 as fast as possible

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Alignment Means Getting Out of Comfort
General.content: The alignment means to go higher one has to get out of the comfort of the solid ground. Solid ground was always an illusion regardless. All it takes is a couple of days where you got put in a desert And after that you could never live the rest of your life where you would be put away from the desert and onto normal life. Your life expectancy may be big, but your life reserve not. You only have in you to live a week or 2.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- AGI-Like Treatment: Invisible Superiority
General.content: AGI like treatment, its not like it wants to kill you, its not like the overhuman wants to end humans, just that it doesn't even play in the same level, it is on a different scale. Independent. So it doesn't wage war on humans, that the resources they use are different, they have different goals and ends. So you let yourself be deceived, you enroll in the game smoothly.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Vanity vs Pride
General.content: That vanity actually is less condescending than pride. Pride is about reaction, while vanity about action. Vanity makes you want to act well for the play of life, pride only makes you not wanna play. Let them have vanity that there is something to watch. There have to be people trying. There have to be people feeling like losers, and sometimes those are the very ones that are winning.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Vain Present You Greatly
General.content: If the vain care a lot about presentation then you will be presented greatly.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Vanity as Protecting the Good
General.content: Vanity is like protecting the good that you considered yourself. Now be sure to make that good worth it. There isn't too much reason in making a great presentation for a product you don't even know what is.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Innocence of Self-Awareness
General.content: Its the I have to be thought rather than the I am. it is the innocence of self awareness.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Stillest Hour Commands
General.content: That commanding great things is beyond accomplishing great things. That yet it is the stillest hour that commands, the silent thoughts at random times that command, not the sound phrases one puts out with a great voice. Only when you are lost within and surrendered to the universe and yourself can you start to approach truth, even if in the moment you don't realize the commanding and the will of the silence.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Bad at Everything Except One Thing
General.content: That being bad at everything except one thing which you are very good at is the inverse cripple curse. It is a deficiency.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Scattering of Human Beings
General.content: That the scattering of human beings, that they seem like coming from a battlefield, all lost. Unifying these pieces into a greater collective project, the overhuman. Making the massive collective of humans and their massive individual come together and contribute to this view.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will: Door to Both Evil and Heaven
General.content: Will is both your door to evil and to heaven. When you are favored by God the devil is coming for you too. It can free you, but it can also enslave you.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Is a Present Thing
General.content: Will is a very present thing. A thing of presence. Will is a liberator and it opens the doors for you, just don't overestimate the time during which the door remains open. If you are not free from wills, and you are still their slave in your search for freedom, be very mindful of the timing of the wills, that willing the past won't be available to you.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- That Is Power: The Choice to Use It
General.content: That is power. It comes but also sticks. You were gifted not with your power, but with the choice if you want to use it or not. If you want to walk through the doors. You have the matrix choice, both pills. All that may be to your detriment is the awareness of the existence of this choice. You know the alternative and realize what choice you took. You know which world you are in. That is the only thing that can backfire. Thats just consciousness tho. Consciousness is the most high level, the easiest to nullify with will.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Revenge Renamed as Punishment
General.content: That revenge doesn't take the same wording as punishment, says Nietzsche to devoid it of bad conscience. To endow it with some justification. Only because time doesn't go backwards does it hurt and you want to inflict that punishment on other people.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Note: Bahnwärter
General.content: Bahnwärter Thiel

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Willing Backwards and Forwards
General.content: Will to power if it is so shall not be weakened because of its revenge on time. So we have to will backwards, or forget it totally. How can the will maximize the utility of there being no return. It has to be both adaptable to the changes in time but also remain one. That is the challenge. To be able to ride bigger and bigger waves without being taken by them. Following and gripping only hopefully as much as one can still let go and come back. Gripping the ride, using it to gain speed and push through to your own path.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Hard to Be Silent Among Humans
General.content: It is hard to be silent with humans says Nietzsche. Yap the übermensch has to keep quiet yet see all the movements of the human. They are distractions, they pull it away from his place, from his path. There is temptation to make things real by telling the secret, yet then you won't live the human experience, their perception and your perception is altered.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Being Around Humans Constrains the Overhuman
General.content: Just being around humans, it changes your mind, the chemicals wiring as some may say, I say it as some percentage of your mind is occupied in humans things, in your human appearance, in societal conventions, in possible conversations you can have with those people, in possible interactions. Presence is very felt. It is very constraining actually, so constraining that you have no hope of claiming freedom. The movement into your overhuman things get interrupted multiple times, this you should train for seamless parallelized process.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Pushing the Limits Without Knowing the Summit
General.content: That pushing the limits, getting better implies not knowing your summits but knowing your values. For ahead of you, in the future, is only rising. And your end is your highest rise. Don't have to win every battle, but have to win the whole of life.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Small, Unplanned Thoughts
General.content: Maybe the power of small thoughts, those unplanned and where you get lost, and only after come back to consciousness about them, comes precisely because of this unconscious process. The true rising of thoughts to the surface, emergence within the mind, things that happen before verbalization. Most of these thoughts are lost. People don't grab them. Most can't even allow themselves to wonder silently enough to hear to them.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Highest Places From Deepest Depths
General.content: The highest of places comes from the deepest of depths. If you put yourself at those depths you will have space upwards, thus feel pain, do as everyone else but harder, add to what everyone does the element of hardness you need and desire, so that the equalizer comes from the height of your summit. If you start like everyone else, it won't be long till other forces will spoil your unimaginable to others longing for height. They will find you crazy beyond certain point, you won't be over human but just unhuman, that you won't live with humans, they will keep you in mind.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Trial and Error as Underestimated Blessing
General.content: Quotes and questions: you gotta do some shit and try some shit to be aware of the consequences, for at any moment if that thing is needed, you will know exactly what it takes, no worries. If you don't, you will have a cloud of uncertainty when it comes the time, fear grows and grows. trial and error is a very underestimated blessing, when simulations of more things are possible it will be the key to improvement.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Love on the Loneliest Solitude
General.content: Quotes and questions: That love on the loneliest solitude is dangerous. Love is a truly powerful thing, and humans can go down the rabbit hole quite far, Nietzsche says to avoid all love except for what is alive. But actually, while the things alive give you the biggest thrill, they also give you the greatest disappointments. The rocks and mountains are consistent. Hard and consistent through time. Again the different time scales of things. You are at a different frequency than things. Sometimes you align with them, sometimes you are out of phase.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Limits Are a Lie
General.content: Quotes and questions: Limits are a lie, feelings are a lie. Everything that someone has ever said that was psychological is a total illusion. Once you get beyond these things, thirst, hunger, tiredness, you get this flow, no questions asked from your body. Infinite energy. Every moment you are new.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Human Flows Highest and Deepest
General.content: Human flows the greatest into the highest mountains, as well as the deepest abyss.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Knowledgeable vs Wise
General.content: Quotes and questions: To be knowledgeable is to know, to be wise is to know better.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Courage as the Greatest Killer
General.content: Courage, courage to go higher, is a confidence that comes from knowing the depths, that one may not fear them, or at least one knows them, even if one fears them one moves up. Courage is the greatest of killers, says Nietzsche. It kills all bullshit. It kills all death. If that's life, one may go at it again, says Nietzsche. Recurrence.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: One Has Children Because He Loves Himself
General.content: Quotes and questions: that one has children because he loves himself

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- To Desire Is to Lose Oneself
General.content: To desire is to lose oneself says Nietzsche. Yes, you need nothing more than yourself, it is easier to not desire if you see yourself. Desire should curve away at your sight.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accept the Abyss: Pain Goes Away
General.content: When one accepts the abyss and the deep pain, when one embraces and waits expects for it, one may even find the pain to go away.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Able to Go When the Gun Goes Off
General.content: There is nothing like being able to go when the gun goes off. Doing things when they are there, being well when you need to do stuff, that can't be taken away from you. If at the possibility of getting closer to flying you immediately smell upwards, rather than downwards of fear, that's value like value can't be bought. You can feel all pain afterwards and be tired and rest afterwards, but once the opportunity presents itself, you are on your highest game.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Beware the Blissful Hour
General.content: Be very very weary and careful and suspicious of the blissful hour. That time where you seem to be good, just enjoying something that in theory doesn't add anything to your life, like cooking, or cleaning the house, or just feeling good with some music. This time you will regret once you realize how much more you could be getting out of your life, and that you are letting time slip away. You will understand how dangerous it is to fall for this fake contempt. No, when cooking or cleaning the house you should be angry and insulted that you have to do this, get it done as fast as possible. Its not ok, you should feel bad.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Extreme Feeling Under the Skin, Peace on the Surface
General.content: You gotta have that extreme feeling burning under your skin not to waste time, yet over the surface be able to contain it at will and thus seem at peace.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The World Deeper Than Any Dive
General.content: The world is deeper than any dive humans made into it. Be blessed and protected by the day that only has 24 hours, that after some 50 hours you fall asleep and away from your digging. Blessed that you can never be pushed by unwanted currents into the depths where light can reach anymore and all is still. That is only intentional and exploratory. May the darkness and increasing depth as you swim away from the safe surface not scare you to do so! That you may find another island along the way

General.title: Idea: Trip to Barcelona
General.content: Chegamos à estacao de barcelona, e apos o primeiro de muitos mercadonas, onde o tesouro dos doriakis foi desvendado, ficamos a tentar comprar bilhetes, o que se mostrou bastante dificil, ate que tivemos expert advice da irma do hugo, e fomos ate terrasa. Terrasa o lugar onde estava o alojamento, que so nesta altura reparamos se localizar no caralho mais velho. Apanhamos chuva, mas entramos. Os quartos eram fixes, havia um gym. Preparamo nos para o sono beleza e no dia seguinte partimos, menos o antonio, que ficou em casa a descansar e a tomar banho e a comer atum. So much winning he couldnt take it anymore. Com grandes ambicoes partimos, tinhamos uma lista da Maria a admin de 30 coisas a visitar, mas nesse dia so conseguimos umas 3. Sagrada familia, cujo interior deixou o lourenco um apreciador de arte moderna, parque guell, onde xandas hugo e lourenco brincaram à exploracao de um manifoldo tridimensional atraves de iterancia de decisao em cada nodo do grafo de caminhos com maior e menor gradiente, e fomos ate à marina, onde nos sentimos uns reis com uma vista a dubai. A irma do hugo chegou e levou nos a conhecer um bar de fadas, onde estivemos a discutir biologia durante umas 2 horas. Era a ultima noite do hugo em barcelona, e apesar de cansados, e de sermos obrigados (mas tambem queriamos) no dia seguinte a acordar cedo para ir visitar a cidade, decidimos ir sair a noite, numa quinta feira onde poucos bares e discotecas gratis estavam abertos. Demos settle nuns shots de absinto e cocktails num bar com excelente musica, para comecar a hypar para a noite. O gil ja tinha ativado o modo freak, ja so falavamos espanhol, e numa decisao impulsiva pagamos 18 paus por uma discoteca de 5 salas, o razzmataz. Chegamos la e descobrimos que tinhamos bilhetes pra o dia seguinte. Tentamos varias solucoes, fomos chatos com os segurancas mas admitimos a derrota. O hugo nao admitiu derrota estando disposto a pagar um total de 40 paus por 30 minutos na discoteca, mas a vibe ja estava perdida. Fomos para casa, nao propriamente saindo nem propriamente dormindo. O hugo despediu se e embarcou para uma jornada de 1 ano na dinamarca, os outros acordaram cedo para ir ver essa barcelona. Fomos pelo centro, encontramos a anastacia a caminho, petiscamos no mercado, e fizemos rotting no jardim. Fomos ate ao aeroporto, fazer mais rotting, ate que nos disseram que o voo tinha sido cancelado. Mesmo depois de termos conseguido enfiar tudo nas malas, pareciamos uns traficantes pelintras que se recusavam a pedir a mala de cabine extra. Uns foram para o hostel e sairam no razmataz obtendo a sua vinganca nos segurancas que haviam arruinado a noite anterior, xandas antonio e maria. Ja o Lourenco ficou a dormir no aeroporto e a continuar a ver os videos de cozinheiros masterchef que tinha visto nessa tarde. O gil foi para o hotel de 4 estrelas que a easy jet abancou ter um sono de qualidade pela primeira vez na viagem. No dia seguinte todos menos o gil foram de rede expressos de 16 horas para lisboa, ja estavam fartos de passar horas em comboios com calor e entao foram passar horas com calor e apertados num autocarro. O gil foi explorar a cidade, nesse e no dia seguinte, onde tomou um banho majestoso de imersao no novo hotel, completou a lista da maria ganhando pontos para o seu ego, e foi de aviao. Gastamos no revolut 3800 euros, conseguindo ir variando bastante a divida entre uns e outros, tendo coletivamente tambem atingido uma divida enorme de sono. Cada um voltou as suas vidazinhas de merda, voltamos todos a miseria, ao lodo, apenas com a recordacao de alguns momentos bons que passamos no interrail, broken em dinheiro e em alma. Vamos no entanto conseguir fazer um video e apresentacao incrivel para os futuros viajantes, onde vamos engana los sobre o nosso insano interrail, e esperamos receber novo financiamento dos nossos patrocinadores, atraves do esquema de piramide, patrocinadores esses o revolut, a discover eu e a easy jet, que, espero eu, vai abancar o almoco de paella de 40 euros do gil e a viagem de bus de 60 do xandas maria e antonio. Saimos desta viagem jovens mais cultos, adultos, melhores a jogar sueca e todas as suas variantes, melhores a viver mesmo sem sono, melhores a digerir leite com lactase e a saber aproveitar o pao nosso de cada dia, melhores a carregar merdas e guarda las numa mochila. Buscamos as fronteiras desse mundo, subindo as montanhas mais altas e vendo as melhores vistas, cheirando os piores peidos e fazendo as maiores caganeiras. Em suma, estamos prontos para a vida de trincheira e caso de guerra.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Blissful Hours: Rediscovering Childhood
General.content: Some blissful hours where you remember what it was like in bliss, in childhood. Being alone away from home and coming back to that swing which you abandoned, swinging some time forgetting time, just swinging, this thing we did way before. Immersion bath the same thing. Away from home rediscovering these lost feelings.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Einstein on Ideas and the Outflow
General.content: Einstein said if you only see others' ideas your brain starts to lose its idea generating power. For you superintelligence overhuman that have huge inflow of ideas, you must find ways of discharging, having also a huge outflow, the usual combo of superintelligence with universal constructor, know and make, feeding one another.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Humans as Their Own Best Domesticated Animal
General.content: Humans have become humans' best domesticated animal, says Nietzsche. This the overhuman avoids. Humans have lost their claws, their rupturing teeth have recessed, and their hunter eye has faded. They have lost the ability to hunt and kill. Yet the overhuman hides, but still has these killing monster abilities. He doesn't fall in the thin illusion that civilized modernity doesn't require and is very far away from this primal level of instinct and mode of negotiation. And being domesticated by other humans is the biggest of fall backs. Letting oneself drift down the food chain, unknowingly, to be at the hands of others. Maintain yourself up there so you have full steering ability over your destiny.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Mediocrity Hidden Behind Moderation
General.content: That mediocrity may be hidden behind the labeling of moderation.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Life Has Infinite Value
General.content: Quotes and questions: people say life doesn't have infinite value, or else they would absolutely do everything in their way as to not die, like staying at home just eating so as not to risk anything. First that is fallacious, living my life is what can be debated to have infinite value, not just any life, not just being alive. But then still people may say the value is finite, cause of course it is it only makes sense for it to be real that way. Yet they are wrong, life does have infinite value, now we don't want to admit that cause then there is infinite pressure to live it to the maximum at every second, which people don't do and would thus see themselves as failures if they allowed themselves to see the truth. It is infinite value. Never forget this. Cause submitting to life is easier. It is easier to have no purpose, and people think the contrary, it is easier to be searching for purpose even if not finding one, and letting one go with the waves. And people really believe that if they thought just being alive had infinite value that they would do everything in their possession not to die, total lie, that they think they are rational agents. They think they do things that they know are right, when in reality that is the problem of most people, that they know what they have to do yet don't do it. And furthermore all it takes is other things besides being alive to have infinite value that all of a sudden you wouldn't rationally any longer give all of yourself, all of the finite or infinite you can give to the pursuit of being alive. And its a strangling feeling, one where you start to lose air and your body demands for movement, stress as some would say, that you realize the value of your life is infinite, and you gotta go on this very moment. So I understand why the human, not the overhuman, runs away from it. And its truly when you realize you are wasting that urgency comes and you start going. If you know your sleeping time is in 20 minutes you will give your max until then, and this major rush at night doesn't come because its night as one may think, it just happens to coincide with night because its when you know today's journey is ending, when you realize you haven't achieved anything today for example, you have nothing to show for, and that gives you energy. Yet if you know you are going to prolong the night it will be shit, so no need to postpone your sleeping time.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Note: Diary Entry
General.content: Adicionar ao diario cena da velha da suica a gritar da propriedade privada

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Life Has Infinite Value (Continuation)
General.content: Quotes and questions continuation: and its with that feeling of urgency that people feel bad, instead of grateful, it hurts but it pushes you like many other feelings. People start diverting it and misdirecting into other things, releasing through listening to sad music for example. Yet embrace it. Feeling like a loser is a privilege. If you felt like a loser even as you conquered the whole world and became a god you would push more. If you feel like a loser after winning multiple nobel prizes you would probably win more. Yet if you have the ability to push yourself regardless of these feelings you are in a position of even more power. gift and curse at the same time, like elon musk said that you get bombarded with ideas. It is not supposed to be easy to make the bridge between the overhuman and the earthly, between the godly matters in which you are enrolled and transmitting that into ideas for this godless world. It will hurt like crap, cause the pressure gradient is tremendous between those realms. The difference of temperature is tremendous, and you the intermediary have to have tremendous resistance and will suffer a bit in letting things pass from one world to the other. You have a small tub and huge things from the godly world will have to fit, and only you can handle the strength on it that it will exert on its way to the earthly.

General.title: Idea: The Paradox of Giving It All and Burnout
General.content: Quotes and questions: being in the flow and floating in the clouds, that is something that can't be bought. When you have more responsibilities like children and what not you won't feel good playing video games. There simply will be too many things circulating your mind unimpeding you from giving your full attention to the game. You know you will have only 2 hours. Maybe even if you had nothing to do you would still have two hours, but just not having it, just being constrained in this limit makes you unable to be fully present. You know there will be consequences. This is also the same trap as when you start believing someone out there is working harder than you. It is the most powerful thing, but at the cost of consuming you deeply. You won't be able to do nothing else but give your maximum in your craft, the drive to be number one through this mechanism takes a lot of stress and suffering thoroughly, resting only in the end, not in the middle. People don't understand what that actually means. Resting in the end not in the middle means you will never rest for as long as you want to be number one, and when you rest to celebrate you won't be number one anymore. It really means you must forget resting, or simply living with the pain of knowing it but not knowing it in that it is an option to you but you keep choosing no. This is half of the main danger of greatness and what keeps people away even if subconsciously from it. It will take everything from you. The other half is you will take everything from it. From the world, that you will have a whatever it takes attitude, which may translate in being ruthless, a dictator of sorts on the world, which can include humans that work with you for example.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Urgency of Knowing Others Will Get Your Ideas
General.content: There also emerges the urgency of knowing that to any idea you get others will get, and you must capitalize on that exclusive short lived so knowledge.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Paradoxically Always Against the Current
General.content: Paradoxically you are always against the current. When you haven't achieved nothing others can see, even if you have already achieved a lot internally and know you are the best, they will say you are a failure and you will say you are a winner, yet when you win so much everybody will tell you you are a winner, you've done it already, but if you want to keep improving beyond the realm of humans and into the sky you will have to have a part of yourself that considers yourself a failure. Its not necessary of course, but it helps, in that it increases the chances. But I won't need it, for enough will power and over power the stagnation. True, you will have no particular reason to keep flying to greater heights, yet that makes it paradoxically have so much more reason, you have your internal reasons, you will have no one pushing you there but yourself.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Silence That Shadows Power
General.content: A silence that shadows one's deeper will, masks through cold and snow and dark the absolute firepower of a star underneath, one slips by, one moves through. Unannounced power.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Dark Silence, Muddy Waters, Hidden Sun
General.content: Dark silence and muddied waters. One may not see the depths nor what hides there nor what hides under the earthly surface one is allowed in. The absolute sun that keeps that habitable, yet that maintains for the human inhabitability close to that core. Yet the capability to, at one's own gaze, and at will turn all the water into a clear and transparent body, to have nothing to hide to oneself. The gap between what you know of yourself and what others know is totally on your hands. So you hide nothing from yourself, you've been through all the depths and still digging further, further into the core that powers you without you knowing, that core of the earth, yet building the sun, the core that you devised to power you, and if needed have that completely shown naked.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude Knocks for Different Reasons
General.content: Solitude comes knocking on the door for some who are wrong among a sea of right people, and for others who are right among a sea of wrong people.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Meaningless Night and Meaningless Movies
General.content: Quotes and Questions: with the same light and of the same sickness I see them suffer, those meaningless wasteful in the night and those meaningless wasteful watching movie after movie. They just direct nothingness into different things.

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Mechanistic Interpretability and Human Experts
General.content: Quotes and questions: mechanistic interpretability helps land some jobs on people who actually know subjects deeply, those subjects that AI has long overtaken humans at. Cause we can actually analyse its reasoning, studying the patterns of the AI in his thoughts to see how it actually works and how to improve. So still people that are damn good at coding will be helpful, the bar that is required then to help in this portion is high, cause if you are a worse programmer than someone else, considerably, perhaps it is not so unreasonable to think you won't be able to add anything to their report. Yet the scale of examples of problems solved by AI and what not will be immense, so many people can work at this at the same time. Its about removing the blackbox that we are still placed in with AI, actually understand what is going on, which has ramifications for AI safety too and the study of intelligence and our own brain. Human experts can still steer the AI. Your hard work on learning things and knowing better things than other humans will not be in vain, even if its the AI making the discoveries you can help it make more better than those who only see numbers, those who only know there is a benchmark and hope it keeps increasing, namely through throwing scale and money at it. Our task is to follow AI, take the ride. It is faster than us, which finally gives us something to hang on to. Keeping the pace with it, it pushes us more. Don't think you will be spared of the work. Don't think physicists will be spared of deep hard thinking, on the very opposite, and this is a widespread mistake in people's vision of AI, the deep and hard thinking will only increase. And all it takes is us not holding onto the lace for some time to not be able to come back at it, but that is losing all control. If we get to the point where it holds tremendous authority over us, simply because we don't know a single stuff of why he does what it does, it can do whatever he wants with us. So keep trying to understand why he makes a certain play on the chess board. It may even be the case that in rigorous disciplines such as physics and maths he lights the way, he shows possibilities but it is still duty of the humans and now enhanced humans and overhumans to actually go there and explore, to see many more things. It has the answers but we have to have the reasoning to those answers, let him tire himself in the huge search space, with its huge speed and scale advantage, and show us where gold is possibly lying, we then take it from there and go find it. We don't want it to give us fish, we want it to teach us to fish a fish.....

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Overhuman vs Navy Seals Tests
General.content: Quotes and questions: for an overhuman navy seals tests and the like are necessary material. If he knows he's done it its just for the others to believe, its even easier to him, that only knows he can damn well do it, just doesn't have done it. If he hasn't done it then it proves great for himself. Now you ask the hardness of these tests of special forces worldwide, the symbolic quitting bell to ring in the navy seal, it may be irrational. At first glance it may be worse for the navy seals, they will lose a lot of smart and capable guys that won't join the game of pointless suffering, yet this is a psy op, thats why it becomes effective. Its effectively mind controlling the seals to serve relentlessly. They dare them to chose the irrational route, and now they are so attached to it and invested through what they have given that they couldn't go back, they are stuck to this mistake of life. Thats how you select for slaves, intentional slaves one may add. That is for the humans. The overhuman always puts himself, again, in a layer above any group, a layer above any ritual, any act, any idea. You can never actually get to him if he doesn't so please. He is always damn protected and there is always a new day sunshine for him even if all else conspires against him. Thats how he is also able to move through obstacles, just willingly and with unseen power eat the grass, go ahead and breaking all walls along the way, you can't affect him, and he can also normalise greatness to a larger extent. Because at the end of the day its greatness of the human, he has already transcended that, he can win and move right through to the next goal post.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Build Your Bed in the Layer Above
General.content: Now about that layer in which yourself live, above all else of the earthly and of the real. You should build yourself a bed there, with a good mattress, so that you never fall from it. A solid base to be forever, cause forever and from ever you have lived and will continue to live there. You become independent of the world. Its one way of immortality, not complete still, but it makes anything that can possibly happen not take you down. Still you rise

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: The Generalist's Unification
General.content: Quotes and questions: you can see and think and recognize the way of the generalist as that of unification. You see many dispersed parts in the world, and you put together the pieces of the puzzle. But you can go further by creating a new puzzle.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Note: Incomplete Fragment
General.content: Now that layer in which you live

General.title: Idea: Quotes and Questions: Two Types of People and Time
General.content: Quotes and questions: there are two types of people: those to whom, the more time passes the less their potential on this world, for others, the opposite, through time they keep expanding their ceiling.

General.title: Idea: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude Among Humans: Wild and Strange
General.content: Solitude among human beings will always be wild and strange, says Nietzsche.
