Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Tragedy of Stopped Potential
Life.content: That we didn't get to see the best of kobe. Thats insane. That we deserved to see more and he deserved to get more. Imagine being ready to win so much more, we don't know quite how much, and being stopped short. Perhaps instead of a basketball player we would call him after his life a master of life.

Life.title: Memorizing vs Understanding
Life.content: Quotes and questions: if you memorize something you don't understand it. You can simply incorporate what you understand. It now comes from within. Now there is admittedly some sexiness to memorizing, it makes parts of stories feel more concrete, for you know exactly who said what, and the date... It makes it good to know of some famous people others admire to have said something, but it takes away from your truth.

Life.title: Some Movies Change You
Life.content: Quotes and questions: Some movies and sceneries inspire you, rise your immediate will, your rage to change, your power to act now. Some inspire thoughts, bring to surface things. With some you increase your aliveness, with others you learn, you discover, you create. But with a special few, you change. Immediately the chip goes in, immediately you know your duties, and you not only see a new reality but take it as your own, you incorporate it and your flesh is stitched where this reality caused the wound. It opened a gate from this reality to yours. You see it immediately. It goes right into your soul and purifies it with some of its water. The purest is water. The simple yet pure, so each reality brings its pure water. There is no need for thought. This is pure assimilation. This is observing the world as it is. No confusions. There are no open loops that your thought works and grinds to close. It presents to you naturally. You become something else right at that interception point. You only hear your breathing, that which in so much time of meditation fails you. You are truthful for once.

Life.title: Levels of Urgency
Life.content: Quotes and questions: there are levels to urgency. You understand that as things happen to you. There are different levels to urgency. The breaking bad urgency. You get glimpses of higher levels.

Life.title: Apex Predator Competition
Life.content: Quotes and questions: This apex predator concept is for competing against yourself,

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Paradox of Preparation
Life.content: The paradox that life is unpredictable and you should be a master of unpredictability yet have the intentions of preparing definitely. So believing that when you get out of today, for example, you will know for your life everything necessary about relationships. You dive super deep so as to close the loop. The paradox is that this belief is good and will translate into real action and consequence, but you will eventually have to get back to the topic of relationships, whether a posteriori, or to remember things, or to actually understand things you saw previously in a better way, now that you are in a position to understand them. So learning is continuous, so is doing, even if your best intention may be to break it into blocks. So every loop is open, and may seem closed only approximately. que o dia morre todos os dias

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Blessing of Finding Nothing
Life.content: Its actually a blessing that when you search something up, some feeling some way of doing, you don't find anything and you have to do it yourself. It means you are onto something new, and you won't get discouraged cause someone already did it. You gonna have to actually make your own unique product. turn it into reality. You wouldn't want these things that you found in your head to be solved, no, you can't satisfy right away those desires. They remain open loops so that you have to get back to them and these visions of yours onto the world. True, you are mad that no one understands what you mean, and theres nothing about it, there isn't the perfect book or video that is going to show you the solution. You have to carve it yourself, and only you have it in your mind to. A constant notification. One underestimates the power of keeping things in the mind for a long time, everything else that you see in the meantime reflects off of that hanging thing. You always have a thing to go back to and do. You know you'll never run out of things, that you keep this list of things that you or other versions of you would do, but you are an apex predator, you go after different versions of you. In some timelines you win more in life than others, but this yours one you go after every way of winning that all the branches have produced. That is the multitude into one of being that you seek. Thats also what it means to become the best version of yourself. Its given all versions making them all together, getting all other versions together. And there are many things that I say I would do if this was just one more life and wasn't the life. If some god gave me an extra life in which whatever happens here doesn't affect the actual life, I would do tattoos no doubt, I would watch a lot of shows and play some games I wished. If this was another life I would enjoy addicting to gta vi. Or watch breaking bad. Or screw brain damage and go full in on mma.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Active Effort and Avoiding Stability
Life.content: Just like without active effort you are going to end up surrounded by people similar in condition to you, if you don't intentionally put in effort, you are going to end up very very similar to your parents. So many times you see the chaos of youth end up unravelling into stability of someone around one of their parents. They settle for that.

Life.title: Comparative Advantage of Desires
Life.content: Quotes and questions:. there is also a comparative advantage theory of desires. For someone eating well may be hugely important in their lives, whereas you may be of the kind that you can go through with anything. As we trade a lot of these things most of the time.

Life.title: Athletic Performance Blueprint
Life.content: Quotes and questions: this is a blueprint for athletic performance, hit every system.

Life.title: Self-Awareness and Judging Yourself Fairly
Life.content: Quotes and questions: you want self awareness, the ability to judge yourself fairly, understanding the true level of performance you are at. This means you will feel worse even if you are better than someone who feels good, embrace that. You won't hide yourself your mistakes, you will cringe through them, but get better in the process.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Note: Organic
Life.content: Organic.

Life.title: Immortality and Competition
Life.content: Quotes and question: people are under this illusion that if they were given immortality, as in freedom to die whenever they'd want through suicide, they would have all the time in the world to do stuff, they could always leave stuff for later. Sure in a strict sense you have time for everything, but there are also infinite things to do, and if someone is 2x faster than you at everything they will do twice of you, given they are immortal too. The point is you live in the finite even if its forever, so there will always be competition and meaning to invest time, opportunity cost. Fundamentally there doesn't exist a ceiling on how good one can be. Non finiteness could even spark a more tense form of competition, since now you have to choose at every moment to keep living, that freedom means if you are to be immortal you will have to make that choice, no great filter or death will make you urgent, it will all have to come from within.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Note: Search Compliments
Life.content: Search compliments and how to be great with them

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Having Children as a Singularity
Life.content: And having kids is a singularity in your life. For the first time there is an order downwards, in that you have someone who by nature will live longer than you, only your children can in principle be at that level. Only they can match you from the get go. So you have it right there in front of you, something that goes beyond you yet is you. It is as close as what you can get to see how you would live in today's time were you there. you are presented with something that outgrows you, that extends you.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Growing Through Language
Life.content: This is how people grow and others may not realize, through their language. Motivation may have worked when they were just getting started, but they now evolved and they are so much beyond that. Their sensibility to truth has decreased, yet their radar for truth is ever more potent. You can emulate all lower levels but you aspire to surround yourself in an environment that pushes the highest level to be even greater still.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The Coach-Athlete Relationship at the Highest Level
Life.content: Think of a relation between high level coach and athlete. Khabib and islam. Does khabib sit there and motivate islam? Of course not, it runs so much deeper than that. Islam is as motivated as anyone and khabib and him are on the same page. Khabib can talk to islam at such a level that just one or two words can carry more truth to islam than reading an entire book could. They probably have their own language at this point, not that the alphabet is different, but simply only islam and khabib's turing machines accept that language, if you model dagestan as a universal computer and islam and khabib as finite automata.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Khabib and Islam: Language Beyond Motivation
Life.content: Think of a coach and athlete relation, like khabib to islam. Do you think khabib has to be there motivating islam, of course not, they are on the same page and islam is already as motivated as anyone else. Khabib doesn't even need to give specific tips, with probably a couple words he can say more truth to islam than islam could read in an entire book.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Catching the Train II
Life.content: Now we have accumulated an undefeated record one again of catching trains. Last time I wrote we had done the craziest journey there, and yet the last two times we took it levels above. Not sure if I wrote one where I went running from the stadium to the underground with cramps all over the calves, but after that there was one where I'd accepted I didn't have time to catch it simply, to change plans and go to saldanha on foot and then entrecampos catching the train at the second stop, the train was late and we got it. Today I was even later and arrived at the underground which pointed 8 minutes, so I had to bet that the train would arrive some 10 minutes late if I was to have any chance of catching it. Went and as I arrived it was already there and after getting in some 20 seconds later it went away.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- At What Level Can You Talk to People
Life.content: At what level can you talk to people. Like talk to them, not just say things to them. Do you believe so little in them you have to say stuff just to be polite. Or you find them valuable and try to extract something from them. Or you are genuinely curious about them and thus are able to just hear them. But how deep do you get with them. In the sense that the more you both share with one another, and that can be through the usual common thing in one another or actually sharing, that is, explicitly becoming entangled with them, created as it were, then you are able to skip the higher levels and get to the real stuff. You don't need to seem polite, or interested for that matter. You may both only select the real value, seeing the whole thing as transactional. Or you may have shared so much you know both of you are there no matter what. So in the lower level you can motivate them, like give them pep talks, but if they are about it as much as you then they already know the motivation, they already have it, and you can start right away from a place of no exaggerations and no metaphors, you can speak reality. On what language are you able to speak with someone. On what grounds does your connection lay. Cause it can be grounded in a deep appreciation that both of you are trying to be the best version they can be.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Want It Most, Need It Least
Life.content: one should understand what things one would go for at any price, yet be present enough that he can at any price get rid of everything he did in the name of the higher platform he so desperately yet so unneedly tries to cling on to. He wants it more than anyone yet needs it less than anyone. Thus I will that I will it.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- Hearing People Too Literally
Life.content: And many times we and I make the mistake of hearing too literally what the people say. Maybe giving too much importance to that which comes out of the mouth in detriment of implicit action that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. In detriment of the feeling that powers those words, that they may or may not be aware, that they may or may not intend. That the real effects at times are not to be found in the meanings of the words, that language in this reduced sense is arbitrary and very particular, we forget that, that we may neglect the faith that may be powering the beliefs powering the words. We sometimes judge too much on what is said rather than the effect for oneself of saying that.

Life.title: Winning The Unforgiving Race to Greatness- The MMA Athlete's Tribute Beyond Themselves
Life.content: This is the different breed that some mma athletes bring to the table, something beyond themselves that they pay tribute, that they owe on their life, that they must give themselves to.

Life.title: Don't Watch Without Doing
Life.content: Quotes and questions: by looking at something amazing or beautiful long enough without doing any of it yourself you may become brain dead. Don't.

Life.title: Deep Thought and Sharp Blades
Life.content: Quotes and questions: while having the deepest longest thought, you ought to be careful enough to also have a little of those small but fast thoughts, so you remember how much sense you have and how sharp are your blades.

Life.title: Be Worldly
Life.content: Quotes and questions: be larger than life, be worldly.

Life.title: On Procrastinating the Next Step
Life.content: Quotes and questions: I've been reported as procrastinating on taking the next step. But there is real power in having the best world model. Of course some procrastinations lead to nothing, but other forms of investing into your world model pay off, and when you come back to the real world per say where you act, you act damn quickly. You let the real world steps process in the unconscious while you are doing other things, and when you come back you do so with a solution. Now this may explain why people don't want to be where they are at, always. They let themselves be filled. They can't rise to the occasion, they can't rise to grow enough to be bigger than what was imposed on them, which was what was imagined and put on the line by the other person, or entity, or institution.

Life.title: No Vacation, No Work Days
Life.content: Quotes and questions: in the limit of the overhuman's life, there is no such thing as vacation or work days. Its all the same. In all you do what you want. You get away from society's limits and live in the continuous exponential. Time is one and you don't live of borrowed time, its value doesn't grow or shrink depending on context, its just an exponential market, that you make your time exponentially more valuable. The thing about the exponential, as many AI people know but not so many know how they can apply it to their life, is that one in the beginning you see very small gains. You may think it is constant, but its still possible to gain awareness that you're actually riding an exponential. Oh and when you know it, oh boy keep it going. The exponential also enjoys the memoryless property, meaning at all times you can feel the same, and you can feel anything, namely, you can feel that you are just now starting to lift off, to start really growing in the exponential, you can at the same time feel you are riding high after so much compounding, as well as just starting and just in the flat line phase, knowing in the future you'll be growing even faster. and there is also no such thing as burnout. You ride that fine line between it and just working hard, but by enjoying what you are doing, by being able to feel it right and not just believe that doing this thing that you otherwise wouldn't have like to be doing hard will give you results, there is no burnout. Burnout is then out of the scope of bounds of the range of effort you can put in. Even if you put max effort, burnout is so far away because you enjoy what you are doing that it will never come. now because there is so much numbness out there, but not for the good reasons, it is an amazing feeling to see great feelings. To see people care so much for something. That is something I've always searched, perhaps because my level of attributed value and caring for life is so so great. But the overhuman doesn't find in humans enough great feelings and caring. He is alone in this, this can be a pain for him, but he has to search inside, which makes his caring even more his and genuine. now one thing that can make you sad by there being no walls between work days and vacation, and this kind of thing and a new kind of thing, is that you are numb to the passage of time. There are no big marking points. You finish your student years, like having the last class of your life, but it doesn't affect you, you move on right away to the next thing.

Life.title: On Caring (Continuation)
Life.content: Quotes and questions continuation this means you are the limit on how much things matter, on the value of life. You are the limiting factor, meaning as much more as you believe and put into the world the more you will live and get out of the world. Now this numbness and inability to feel also makes people not act, because they base themselves on feelings and when they don't feel strongly enough, they don't correspondly act. Like smokers who say they want to quit, but they don't actually feel the consequences of keeping on smoking, they don't feel as bad as they should, perhaps they hide themselves from the part of themselves that could make them feel so bad as to quit, make the weight of not quitting greater than the pain of not ever again smoking.

Life.title: On Caring and Numbness
Life.content: Quotes and questions: from Yudkowsky's sequences, on caring. That how big the world is and yet how small we are and how little our scope is, that makes big problems not feel so big, it drives us powerless through numbness. And not just global problems, or problems of the scales of the universe. But all the problems with their respective scale. We may not be able to feel the same pain, or even see how high it is, when for example someone has a family member that has passed. Yet we do our internal calculations of how painful that is, we trust our mind over our feelings to help them. Now actually this is just right, for if everyone could feel and carry the weight of the problems in the world and in their lives at all times, at all times they would be in bed, unable to lift themselves up. Powerless through hypersensitivity, the opposite of numbness. It takes an ever stronger soul to bear and confront the height of these things, without feeling small. To take it on and thus elevate itself to those heights, to see eye to eye with those things. So we notice that the first kind of powerlessness was powerlessness to help, not powerless to do anything, on the other hand, you are very free. The best of both worlds is to help and be free. To not feel is a privilege, for you are not stopped to act on it, but you are free from its burden. Things are all under your control. But feeling when in your control is also damn good. The best of both worlds the overhuman strikes is feeling when he wants to feel what he wants to feel. If he wants to know what it feels like something, he feels that. He can tune the inputs, the different melodies he hears. And he acts as though the world is really as big as he believe it is. This is massive. The world also, but this also, so I believe it. I sometimes enter these vicious loops, that means they are independent, they need something to get going and looping. That something is my belief

Life.content: Quotes and questions: the paradox of giving it all. It's both so easy and hard at the same time. Its so simple, so clear what you have to do, yet giving your maximum is so hard, people usually are well below their maximum when they think its their maximum.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Note: To Search
Life.content: To search: diving deep into all things that take away brain capability by killing neurons or stuff. For example, alcohol, brain damage from contact sports....

Life.title: On the Desire to Dance
Life.content: Quotes and questions: its hard to contain that excitement and will to dance and live. Sometimes you feel music hitting without you even hearing it. Sometimes singing to yourself the music has greater effect than the transitory listen people give it.

Life.title: Fun Is Not the Most Important
Life.content: Quotes and questions: if having fun was the most important, you wouldn't need to say that fun is the most important. The commentator says djoko still got that touch on the tennis ball, and more importantly he still has fun. Bullshit. If he means that by having fun he is able to play at previous level, it means that fun wasn't the most important. And what made djoko and continues to make him is not having fun. so in saying fun is the most important the commentator is really just exercising in remembering that fun still is a factor even tho what he does with djoko has nothing to do with fun.

Life.title: Group Depth vs Individual Depth
Life.content: Quotes and questions: with friends you notice most groups stall at some level of depth, that more depth is not taken into account, not treated well. Not given the respect it deserves. Now the level of depth with each you dive into individuals of that group is orthogonal to the depth allowed by that group, they are uncorrelated.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Receiving Yourself in All Forms
Life.content: So receiving yourself in all your forms, quite as literally as you so please. Don't shy of having dinners with your monsters, or have business meetings with them that you will have to share the same space, so better strike some deals. It is as great a tragedy to lose contact with someone, as in you haven't maintain a relationship sufficiently that now its inaccessible to you, to lose some parts of yourself through this process. the internal world is at least as great as the outer world, this goes unnoticed at times. point being theres a lot to do with just yourself, in fact everything you would do with someone else, with humans, and if of a overhuman were talking, only in yourself will you find it most likely. Play with yourself, tease, have fun with yourself.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Imaginary Friends as Parts of the Self
Life.content: The power of imaginary friends comes when you recognize they are all part of the self. Here you can leverage what external projection gives you while knowing you have full internal control over all of it.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Commanding Your Values to Yourself
Life.content: Realize that even if there were no humans, talking to yourself and commanding your values onto yourself and singing to yourself is still of value. Just because there are and we use voice for them doesn't mean that if there weren't we wouldn't do so. You should still show yourself what you like, as if having visitors at home and showing your product, showing the decoration of where you live, your space, and your headspace, reminding yourself of your motives as much as you show them to others. And talking to yourself, and being curious about yourself. And revisiting yourself often, and preparing for your visit, cleaning your place as you do to others.

Life.title: Hungry Lions and Ferocity
Life.content: Quotes and questions: now there are two types of people in this world. Those that get dizzy and soft with hunger, and those that turn into hungry lions, those whose ferocity increases and those whose ferocity decreases.

Life.title: Hard Conversations as Checkpoints
Life.content: Quotes and questions: hard conversations are those that make you evolve, checkpoints. Just like much less over time you see your parents, much less will they have the hard conversations with you. You should be grateful if you still get lectured. Embrace it. Hopefully they haven't yet given up on you; they still want to carry you to a good port

Life.title: Reacting vs Acting
Life.content: Quotes and questions: many times people fall in the trap of reacting rather than acting. They see things exaggerated one way, and instead of grounding themselves they position themselves too much the opposite way, even if that is not their home, to bring some sort of balance, which only cultivates discussion and anger and revenge building desires. One should be unshakeable, memoryless, independent, in that the condition probability doesn't condition on anything.

Life.title: Comparative Advantage in Life
Life.content: Quotes and questions: have in mind the power of comparative advantage in your life. If you right now due to the environment surrounding you can do better something relative to another thing, you have to do both things, and you want to maximize your output, it is smarter to do the specialty thing, that which relatively at the moment is the easier to do, or that you can get out more of. So even if you get more out of reading one book right now, if reading another one will be more valuable now than later, and the other one maintains value, you ought to read the other one. You trade tasks in your time economy with all versions of yourself through time. All it takes is knowing what there is to do. Now keep in mind there are things with negative output, things you don't want to do, even if right now is the perfect moment to do them probably don't.

Life.title: Two Types of People and Time
Life.content: Quotes and questions: there are two types of people: those to whom, the more time passes the less their potential on this world, for others, the opposite, through time they keep expanding their ceiling.

Life.title: The Generalist's Unification
Life.content: Quotes and questions: you can see and think and recognize the way of the generalist as that of unification. You see many dispersed parts in the world, and you put together the pieces of the puzzle. But you can go further by creating a new puzzle.

Life.title: Overhuman vs Navy Seals Tests
Life.content: Quotes and questions: for an overhuman navy seals tests and the like are necessary material. If he knows he's done it its just for the others to believe, its even easier to him, that only knows he can damn well do it, just doesn't have done it. If he hasn't done it then it proves great for himself. Now you ask the hardness of these tests of special forces worldwide, the symbolic quitting bell to ring in the navy seal, it may be irrational. At first glance it may be worse for the navy seals, they will lose a lot of smart and capable guys that won't join the game of pointless suffering, yet this is a psy op, thats why it becomes effective. Its effectively mind controlling the seals to serve relentlessly. They dare them to chose the irrational route, and now they are so attached to it and invested through what they have given that they couldn't go back, they are stuck to this mistake of life. Thats how you select for slaves, intentional slaves one may add. That is for the humans. The overhuman always puts himself, again, in a layer above any group, a layer above any ritual, any act, any idea. You can never actually get to him if he doesn't so please. He is always damn protected and there is always a new day sunshine for him even if all else conspires against him. Thats how he is also able to move through obstacles, just willingly and with unseen power eat the grass, go ahead and breaking all walls along the way, you can't affect him, and he can also normalise greatness to a larger extent. Because at the end of the day its greatness of the human, he has already transcended that, he can win and move right through to the next goal post.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Fundamentally Dissociate from Groups
Life.content: Fundamentally dissociate from groups. Never see yourself through the light of a group, I am not part of any group, its they not us. Always save at least an extra layer for yourself over the group, because you matter more than the group.

Life.title: Meaningless Night and Meaningless Movies
Life.content: Quotes and Questions: with the same light and of the same sickness I see them suffer, those meaningless wasteful in the night and those meaningless wasteful watching movie after movie. They just direct nothingness into different things.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Solitude Knocks for Different Reasons
Life.content: Solitude comes knocking on the door for some who are wrong among a sea of right people, and for others who are right among a sea of wrong people.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Silence That Shadows Power
Life.content: A silence that shadows one's deeper will, masks through cold and snow and dark the absolute firepower of a star underneath, one slips by, one moves through. Unannounced power.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Paradoxically Always Against the Current
Life.content: Paradoxically you are always against the current. When you haven't achieved nothing others can see, even if you have already achieved a lot internally and know you are the best, they will say you are a failure and you will say you are a winner, yet when you win so much everybody will tell you you are a winner, you've done it already, but if you want to keep improving beyond the realm of humans and into the sky you will have to have a part of yourself that considers yourself a failure. Its not necessary of course, but it helps, in that it increases the chances. But I won't need it, for enough will power and over power the stagnation. True, you will have no particular reason to keep flying to greater heights, yet that makes it paradoxically have so much more reason, you have your internal reasons, you will have no one pushing you there but yourself.

Life.title: The Paradox of Giving It All and Burnout
Life.content: Quotes and questions: being in the flow and floating in the clouds, that is something that can't be bought. When you have more responsibilities like children and what not you won't feel good playing video games. There simply will be too many things circulating your mind unimpeding you from giving your full attention to the game. You know you will have only 2 hours. Maybe even if you had nothing to do you would still have two hours, but just not having it, just being constrained in this limit makes you unable to be fully present. You know there will be consequences. This is also the same trap as when you start believing someone out there is working harder than you. It is the most powerful thing, but at the cost of consuming you deeply. You won't be able to do nothing else but give your maximum in your craft, the drive to be number one through this mechanism takes a lot of stress and suffering thoroughly, resting only in the end, not in the middle. People don't understand what that actually means. Resting in the end not in the middle means you will never rest for as long as you want to be number one, and when you rest to celebrate you won't be number one anymore. It really means you must forget resting, or simply living with the pain of knowing it but not knowing it in that it is an option to you but you keep choosing no. This is half of the main danger of greatness and what keeps people away even if subconsciously from it. It will take everything from you. The other half is you will take everything from it. From the world, that you will have a whatever it takes attitude, which may translate in being ruthless, a dictator of sorts on the world, which can include humans that work with you for example.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Mediocrity Hidden Behind Moderation
Life.content: That mediocrity may be hidden behind the labeling of moderation.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Blissful Hours: Rediscovering Childhood
Life.content: Some blissful hours where you remember what it was like in bliss, in childhood. Being alone away from home and coming back to that swing which you abandoned, swinging some time forgetting time, just swinging, this thing we did way before. Immersion bath the same thing. Away from home rediscovering these lost feelings.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Happy to See Someone Caring for the Earth
Life.content: You are happy to see that someone is taking care of this earth and loving it, even if not loving it really, but still they do company to it, where you who love it more have to go away from it and onto greater platforms.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Ambitions Find Others' Virtues Small
Life.content: You that have great ambitions find the virtues of others ever smaller, find joy in seeing them content, that they can live with small virtues, that they can leave this earth without knowing a lot of things, that they can forever live in this earth and not seek escape. That they can make of the bit they are enough. You are glad that there are such people, you are glad people that don't know what you know can still have something going for them. You find peace in knowing you could never be them, and they could never be you, and you support them in their direction, and they in yours, even if no one understands each way.

Life.title: Trip to Barcelona
Life.content: Chegamos à estacao de barcelona, e apos o primeiro de muitos mercadonas, onde o tesouro dos doriakis foi desvendado, ficamos a tentar comprar bilhetes, o que se mostrou bastante dificil, ate que tivemos expert advice da irma do hugo, e fomos ate terrasa. Terrasa o lugar onde estava o alojamento, que so nesta altura reparamos se localizar no caralho mais velho. Apanhamos chuva, mas entramos. Os quartos eram fixes, havia um gym. Preparamo nos para o sono beleza e no dia seguinte partimos, menos o antonio, que ficou em casa a descansar e a tomar banho e a comer atum. So much winning he couldnt take it anymore. Com grandes ambicoes partimos, tinhamos uma lista da Maria a admin de 30 coisas a visitar, mas nesse dia so conseguimos umas 3. Sagrada familia, cujo interior deixou o lourenco um apreciador de arte moderna, parque guell, onde xandas hugo e lourenco brincaram à exploracao de um manifoldo tridimensional atraves de iterancia de decisao em cada nodo do grafo de caminhos com maior e menor gradiente, e fomos ate à marina, onde nos sentimos uns reis com uma vista a dubai. A irma do hugo chegou e levou nos a conhecer um bar de fadas, onde estivemos a discutir biologia durante umas 2 horas. Era a ultima noite do hugo em barcelona, e apesar de cansados, e de sermos obrigados (mas tambem queriamos) no dia seguinte a acordar cedo para ir visitar a cidade, decidimos ir sair a noite, numa quinta feira onde poucos bares e discotecas gratis estavam abertos. Demos settle nuns shots de absinto e cocktails num bar com excelente musica, para comecar a hypar para a noite. O gil ja tinha ativado o modo freak, ja so falavamos espanhol, e numa decisao impulsiva pagamos 18 paus por uma discoteca de 5 salas, o razzmataz. Chegamos la e descobrimos que tinhamos bilhetes pra o dia seguinte. Tentamos varias solucoes, fomos chatos com os segurancas mas admitimos a derrota. O hugo nao admitiu derrota estando disposto a pagar um total de 40 paus por 30 minutos na discoteca, mas a vibe ja estava perdida. Fomos para casa, nao propriamente saindo nem propriamente dormindo. O hugo despediu se e embarcou para uma jornada de 1 ano na dinamarca, os outros acordaram cedo para ir ver essa barcelona. Fomos pelo centro, encontramos a anastacia a caminho, petiscamos no mercado, e fizemos rotting no jardim. Fomos ate ao aeroporto, fazer mais rotting, ate que nos disseram que o voo tinha sido cancelado. Mesmo depois de termos conseguido enfiar tudo nas malas, pareciamos uns traficantes pelintras que se recusavam a pedir a mala de cabine extra. Uns foram para o hostel e sairam no razmataz obtendo a sua vinganca nos segurancas que haviam arruinado a noite anterior, xandas antonio e maria. Ja o Lourenco ficou a dormir no aeroporto e a continuar a ver os videos de cozinheiros masterchef que tinha visto nessa tarde. O gil foi para o hotel de 4 estrelas que a easy jet abancou ter um sono de qualidade pela primeira vez na viagem. No dia seguinte todos menos o gil foram de rede expressos de 16 horas para lisboa, ja estavam fartos de passar horas em comboios com calor e entao foram passar horas com calor e apertados num autocarro. O gil foi explorar a cidade, nesse e no dia seguinte, onde tomou um banho majestoso de imersao no novo hotel, completou a lista da maria ganhando pontos para o seu ego, e foi de aviao. Gastamos no revolut 3800 euros, conseguindo ir variando bastante a divida entre uns e outros, tendo coletivamente tambem atingido uma divida enorme de sono. Cada um voltou as suas vidazinhas de merda, voltamos todos a miseria, ao lodo, apenas com a recordacao de alguns momentos bons que passamos no interrail, broken em dinheiro e em alma. Vamos no entanto conseguir fazer um video e apresentacao incrivel para os futuros viajantes, onde vamos engana los sobre o nosso insano interrail, e esperamos receber novo financiamento dos nossos patrocinadores, atraves do esquema de piramide, patrocinadores esses o revolut, a discover eu e a easy jet, que, espero eu, vai abancar o almoco de paella de 40 euros do gil e a viagem de bus de 60 do xandas maria e antonio. Saimos desta viagem jovens mais cultos, adultos, melhores a jogar sueca e todas as suas variantes, melhores a viver mesmo sem sono, melhores a digerir leite com lactase e a saber aproveitar o pao nosso de cada dia, melhores a carregar merdas e guarda las numa mochila. Buscamos as fronteiras desse mundo, subindo as montanhas mais altas e vendo as melhores vistas, cheirando os piores peidos e fazendo as maiores caganeiras. Em suma, estamos prontos para a vida de trincheira e caso de guerra.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Extreme Feeling Under the Skin, Peace on the Surface
Life.content: You gotta have that extreme feeling burning under your skin not to waste time, yet over the surface be able to contain it at will and thus seem at peace.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Beware the Blissful Hour
Life.content: Be very very weary and careful and suspicious of the blissful hour. That time where you seem to be good, just enjoying something that in theory doesn't add anything to your life, like cooking, or cleaning the house, or just feeling good with some music. This time you will regret once you realize how much more you could be getting out of your life, and that you are letting time slip away. You will understand how dangerous it is to fall for this fake contempt. No, when cooking or cleaning the house you should be angry and insulted that you have to do this, get it done as fast as possible. Its not ok, you should feel bad.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Able to Go When the Gun Goes Off
Life.content: There is nothing like being able to go when the gun goes off. Doing things when they are there, being well when you need to do stuff, that can't be taken away from you. If at the possibility of getting closer to flying you immediately smell upwards, rather than downwards of fear, that's value like value can't be bought. You can feel all pain afterwards and be tired and rest afterwards, but once the opportunity presents itself, you are on your highest game.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accept the Abyss: Pain Goes Away
Life.content: When one accepts the abyss and the deep pain, when one embraces and waits expects for it, one may even find the pain to go away.

Life.title: One Has Children Because He Loves Himself
Life.content: Quotes and questions: that one has children because he loves himself

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Courage as the Greatest Killer
Life.content: Courage, courage to go higher, is a confidence that comes from knowing the depths, that one may not fear them, or at least one knows them, even if one fears them one moves up. Courage is the greatest of killers, says Nietzsche. It kills all bullshit. It kills all death. If that's life, one may go at it again, says Nietzsche. Recurrence.

Life.title: Limits Are a Lie
Life.content: Quotes and questions: Limits are a lie, feelings are a lie. Everything that someone has ever said that was psychological is a total illusion. Once you get beyond these things, thirst, hunger, tiredness, you get this flow, no questions asked from your body. Infinite energy. Every moment you are new.

Life.title: Trial and Error as Underestimated Blessing
Life.content: Quotes and questions: you gotta do some shit and try some shit to be aware of the consequences, for at any moment if that thing is needed, you will know exactly what it takes, no worries. If you don't, you will have a cloud of uncertainty when it comes the time, fear grows and grows. trial and error is a very underestimated blessing, when simulations of more things are possible it will be the key to improvement.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Highest Places From Deepest Depths
Life.content: The highest of places comes from the deepest of depths. If you put yourself at those depths you will have space upwards, thus feel pain, do as everyone else but harder, add to what everyone does the element of hardness you need and desire, so that the equalizer comes from the height of your summit. If you start like everyone else, it won't be long till other forces will spoil your unimaginable to others longing for height. They will find you crazy beyond certain point, you won't be over human but just unhuman, that you won't live with humans, they will keep you in mind.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Small, Unplanned Thoughts
Life.content: Maybe the power of small thoughts, those unplanned and where you get lost, and only after come back to consciousness about them, comes precisely because of this unconscious process. The true rising of thoughts to the surface, emergence within the mind, things that happen before verbalization. Most of these thoughts are lost. People don't grab them. Most can't even allow themselves to wonder silently enough to hear to them.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Pushing the Limits Without Knowing the Summit
Life.content: That pushing the limits, getting better implies not knowing your summits but knowing your values. For ahead of you, in the future, is only rising. And your end is your highest rise. Don't have to win every battle, but have to win the whole of life.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- That Is Power: The Choice to Use It
Life.content: That is power. It comes but also sticks. You were gifted not with your power, but with the choice if you want to use it or not. If you want to walk through the doors. You have the matrix choice, both pills. All that may be to your detriment is the awareness of the existence of this choice. You know the alternative and realize what choice you took. You know which world you are in. That is the only thing that can backfire. Thats just consciousness tho. Consciousness is the most high level, the easiest to nullify with will.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Will Is a Present Thing
Life.content: Will is a very present thing. A thing of presence. Will is a liberator and it opens the doors for you, just don't overestimate the time during which the door remains open. If you are not free from wills, and you are still their slave in your search for freedom, be very mindful of the timing of the wills, that willing the past won't be available to you.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Bad at Everything Except One Thing
Life.content: That being bad at everything except one thing which you are very good at is the inverse cripple curse. It is a deficiency.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Evil as Incubator of Greatness
Life.content: Don't underestimate the power of evil to hatch greatness within someone. In fact the fastest way to greatness may just be through evil. The long way round through good is the hardest and most praiseworthy way. You should know both and choose the good one, only then it is a good path, that you explicitly reject evil. Being afraid of it will only put you at a disadvantage that you don't know it, that you have an escape route, an escape goat, that even if you lay all in the line there is still the possibility that through the path you didn't know you lost. No, have all the cards in front of you so you can be assured and firm on the piece that you gave it all.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Vain Present You Greatly
Life.content: If the vain care a lot about presentation then you will be presented greatly.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Smooth with Humans: Leverage Their Multiplicity
Life.content: So if smoothly you want to be with humans you must use them, leverage each perk of their multitude, their difference and individuality, and with anyone of them be

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Alignment Means Getting Out of Comfort
Life.content: The alignment means to go higher one has to get out of the comfort of the solid ground. Solid ground was always an illusion regardless. All it takes is a couple of days where you got put in a desert And after that you could never live the rest of your life where you would be put away from the desert and onto normal life. Your life expectancy may be big, but your life reserve not. You only have in you to live a week or 2.

Life.title: Consciousness and Waking Up to War
Life.content: Quotes and questions: the consciousness is the first and most fundamental thing that defines a human. Without your consciousness you are rendered useless. it is also what makes the overhuman overhumanness. Get me out of my consciousness and you may just have a chance of taking my freedom away. Like in the ufc. Then you may have a chance of winning. and waking up is that process, and you should be able to wake up at any point of your sleep cycle right away born into war. 0-100 or actually 0 to 1 as fast as possible

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Look Where You're Going, Not Down
Life.content: The precipice says Nietzsche, let alone the ground. That in which you don't look where you are falling. To actually move you want to look where you are going. If for the stars you are shooting there you should look. Looking downwards while trying to go up doesn't work. Looking and living the human while trying to overcome it won't work. Looking at other humans that aren't shooting for the skies, or looking at places other than skies, can only give your more will to go up and to the stars and to not look if you live among them, remember still of what is up there. Remember you are being seen from up there and there you go.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Afraid of Heights, Comfortable with the Ground
Life.content: We get scared of heights, of seeing where we can fall, instead of being scared of the bottom, where we feel the comfort of having a permanence, that bottom from which we can't descend further. that happens if you are always looking down. But if you are living in the future and always up higher, always seeking higher, the permanence it is the ground that scares you, that it seems inhuman to be able to climb so much. Paradoxically it is the inhuman endeavor of climbing it that makes it easier.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Let Life Interpret the Dream
Life.content: Let your life itself interpret that dream that you as of yet can't understand totally, for it comes from the future that you are living in but not where you are at, that same life which is the consequence of your dream.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Only You Kept Up With Yourself
Life.content: Now on the way to overhuman through that dream and living in the future the only one that kept up with you is yourself. Thus you develop a special distinguished relation with yourself. One that treats you as all too different than the human all too human

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Boring Nature of Some Things Is Inevitable
Life.content: another inevitability people laughably get themselves mad over and lose opportunity from is the boring nature of some things. A flight will be boring for everyone, whether you are watching your favorite show or reading a tough philosophical text. Everyone will suffer, you decide whether that suffering is going to take you somewhere. You will suffer regardless.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Rush Against Time Is the Most Against Nature
Life.content: And the most against nature thing you could do is to want to rush time, as in be afraid of it, be avoidant of it, rather than enjoy it to the fullest and be fine with having infinite time to do whatever you are doing now. If being trapped in time scares you, you are enslaved. Amidst the inevitability of time that is the most worthless pursuit. You get stressed and tired pushing against an immovable wall. Time is he who you spend the most, so make it your friend. The most time. The most anything.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Events Take Time to Develop
Life.content: Great events also may take some time to develop, to travel through all layers of your awareness and consciousness. You only notice you were born anew some time after. You can't pinpoint a date, you can't pinpoint a discontinuity, it is all continuous yet it amounted to all this many change.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Enjoy While Sharp
Life.content: Enjoy while you are sharp. Maybe forever. But enjoy it if in your case it won't be forever. Use it to the maximum of its ability. Some people absolutely waste it doing old human things.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Make Moves Forever, Not Just Big Moves
Life.content: So strive to not only make big moves on the world, making things that last forever, but better making moves forever, being forever in the limit changing the world.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Move with the World or Be Left Behind
Life.content: Yet you want to move with the world as it moves. Always be able to do that. You must understand the movement of the world, you get behind, you can't move it anymore. To be moving the limits you must be right at the edge, pushing that wall. To move them you in fact must be ahead at least while you move it. and it will no doubt be a different world. They say the young change the world. They have energy which fuels its movement around, its time translation, and you will see some, usually the old, unable to keep the pace of change. Initially they won't realize it, for for some they are just doing what they, even if unknowingly were always doing, following others values. But it becomes flagrant when you look at the world and you simply can't understand it. There is a disconnect. You are living in a past version. Just a matter of time to when that past version will no longer be compatible with the current software, and it won't be possible to survive in the current. sometimes you look at old people looking at everyone on the screen. Some reading, some doing work, some playing games, some consuming content. It is sad to look at them looking, they are out of place, they don't realize the power of these things if steered in the right direction, they stick to what they've been taught by people who knew less and are already dead.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Root Yourself as Deep as Possible
Life.content: That one must root his self as deep as possible, for in case of failure the deepest, the very root is what comes out. When there is no thinking allowed or projection to the future or hope or feeling what comes out is the raw essence.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Great Events Need Not Be Loud
Life.content: That great events need not be loud. That people hide depth by being in muddy waters. That real deepness makes sound hard to reach the surface. Hard to make an explosion from the depths.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Making Up for Parents in Children
Life.content: Nietzsche says "in my children I want to make up for being the child of my parents, and in all future- for this present." so you didn't earn the gift of life, but you can give it to others. And you also didn't earn the gift of being able to give of life to others, that becomes as much a gift to yourself as a cost to your gift.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Living Ahead: The Delay
Life.content: The explicit case of living ahead, with this delay is when you've moved on from what you are now doing, already fully into the thing that comes after. It makes you enjoy what is to die, before overcoming it.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Moving Forward by Definition
Life.content: And inside a life to move on by definition has to come to the future. So this doesn't mean just people of the past, but you of the past, and once again you always are with a delay, that you reap later what you sow now.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Own Face as the Best Mask
Life.content: That there is no better masks for those of the present than their own faces. You are already as unrecognizable as it gets. This says Nietzsche. And as unrecognizable for unlike masks it doesn't hide, it shows, and to others it clearly shows its not you, masks could actually introduce some doubt.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Speaking Many Languages: Everywhere at Home
Life.content: For this freedom of thought and life, speaking many languages is important. Thats why it is important. Everywhere at home.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Never Limit Yourself
Life.content: Never limit yourself. There is always an option. People don't think on first principles. There are many soft limits before the hard limit. Exploit them.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Environment and Friends Change Your Mind
Life.content: Your environment very much influences you, we know that. Now one very specific case is if you are with friends. Literally your thoughts change. If you are reading a book instead of just thinking on it or other things half of your brain will have thoughts relevant to conversation with the friends. You can focus as much. One small brainrot by one and now all descend spiralling into fun.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Stop When Full
Life.content: That one shouldn't stop when one is full, that actually one should never allow oneself to get full, only when beauty is acquired says Nietzsche, sometimes your goal is way past feeling full. Sometimes force feeding becomes necessary, push through complacency. Memorylessness helps with this aspect of exploding at every moment.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Live Under a Rock
Life.content: Don't let yourself live under a rock. You don't feel it but can see in other people that it is sad, that one lives masked from truth, that one self restricts and withdraws even if not knowingly. Now there are many rocks one can live under. In many of them you should live under, we are here talking about that which matters. Many distractions would better be used dissolving in air than getting inside your rock

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Pushing Through Others' Reactions
Life.content: And there are my explicitations of this thing of pushing through others reaction to thing one doesn't control. Like seeing them complain. That can only give you more power to move and go get it. It can only fuel your fire. Its almost like you team up with what brings those bad events.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Memorylessness
Life.content: And the belief of memorylessness simply has power. You spend less time in shaky terrains, that past and future. You get to find more opportunities in the present, you get to make more, you only use past as long as it cavoes you now, through past win for example, you are unaffected by your loses and get to go with maximum confidence now when it matters.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Delusionality Has Power
Life.content: Delusionality, there is power in it. Building a mystique around yourself, it goes along with it. For example this belief I now share with you, helper, even if obviously untrue for some. That I see the people who watch my instagram stories and believe they all see it, even people I thought wouldn't, and those to whom I don't correspond by also seeing theirs, I believe they see it as support, they know I'm the one and they believe in me, they look to see if I have already become all that they saw in me to be.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- All Feelings Make You Stronger
Life.content: All feelings should make you stronger,

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Stockholm Syndrome with Lies
Life.content: It feels that even after lies are dismantled people still waste time believing them, some sort of stockholm syndrome mixed with bias for what you previously believed, attachment.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Winning From Others' Frustrations
Life.content: And of what you can't control and off of delays and things that mess up life you can actually win by pulling on other's frustrations to move ahead, you see their reaction and you smell blood in the water, you go win.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Making Time Stand Still
Life.content: With the cards you are handed don't neglect the power of making time stand still. That you have nothing you can do for example. That maybe your train is 5 hours late and you are in the middle of nowhere, with only your thoughts and maybe something to immortalize them, a pen and paper for example. No rush, no duty, you have it right now, free time.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Don't Rest Until You Know
Life.content: Don't rest until you know it and be at the end all be all.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Soul of the Bull
Life.content: The soul of the bull pushing in all directions and ragely so, ragely at that which he cannot control, which still gives him power and control over what he controls. Yes he focus so much on what he can control that he leverages what he cannot for it use the rage against the minimum thing that has been given to you that yet you believe won't change, like the finiteness of life or whatever. Yet precisely through what those fortunes that have been handed to you you can be grateful of the cards you are handed, you can recognize opportunity.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Normalization
Life.content: Normalising allows above all to get stuff done, to not think of the upcoming moment as holy, thus one doesn't have to pray to it, or hear music to reach an elevated mental state which can just fall below baseline after he gets away from that moment. It allows you to move past and get more. If you know deep down you want something, this lack of celebration in the middle, this lack of rest in the middle, won't harm your will.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Still Bits of Despising
Life.content: There is still bits of despising, that means his body hasn't yet developed the enzymes to treat anyhow, weakness. One becomes neutral, then one develops tastes anew, whose fire shows only truth brought about by neutrality.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Withdrawn from Valueless, Not from Unknowing
Life.content: You want to be Withdrawn from parts of the world without value, not without knowing.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Hungry Lion Is Stronger
Life.content: That a hungry lion is stronger. This idea that when you are stripped of what you want you want it that much more and you are more ferocious and able to tap into a primal nerve that propels you. Make it yours this drive. All of the food for thought and food and food of good that enters you you must burn it to keep yourself from the mindstate of the content.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Apply Tension, Then Let Go
Life.content: You gotta be able to apply tension to control it all, yet let yourself go with the most random of flows. Tense yourself too early, and tensing means you come back to your core, that all other modes of movement don't roll with you, and you may be losing on a lot. Be able to be super flexible and extend the soul in all directions, yet at all times knowing you could control it all. There is more power to knowing you can do stuff than people realize. The counterfactual world truly has consequence in the so called real world. If you know how something would go if you did it, you may not be bound to it, you may be free to think other things, you don't have to go ahead and confirm. If you already saw the end of the line through one path, you may not need to follow it if you see it has not great value. You may have greater pace of executing and operating inside your head, that your mental model of others for example can run faster than themselves, even tho there is some component that you don't learn because you didn't get the randomness of the real world.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Elephants in the Room Grow
Life.content: The elephants in the room grow ever more the longer they are unaddressed. Unchecked. Unbalanced. If you don't check the prisoner evil is inside its cell, if you don't gather yourself to look at it, it may have already escaped. It may have already latched onto to other things unknowingly. With these evils you want to tame them, contain them, and isolate them, that they may be yours and never something of you be theirs.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Hard Core with No Form
Life.content: The image you want to have is that of a hard core that can either be absolutely still or teeming with the greatest form of life. When it comes down to it, be built out of building blocks that are like water, they can flow or they can crash. That hard as anything core that is unbreakable precisely cause it has no form.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be Afraid of Nothing, Even Harsh Truths
Life.content: Be afraid of nothing, even harsh truths, we had already gotten there previously. Now silenced truths become toxic, says Nietzsche. If others have seen more of these than you, if you shied away from one of these that may come to haunt you, it may present as weakness on you, that you are not capable of realizing it. That certain smell gets you away. Yet no smell ought to get you away, you have battled all evil, none of it can intimidate you.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overflow of the Soul for Love of Life
Life.content: Overflow of your soul for the love of life

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Your Core, Hidden from Others
Life.content: And how could others interfere with this internal judge and internal battles and internal evolution that they can't see, they who see only the winning commander, and mostly don't even see him? This is your core, that you stick to, and that lives beyond the selves with others that you have.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Beloved Creation Inside Your Mind
Life.content: Even perhaps your most beloved creation which is inside your mind, him to whom you talk and he understands you.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Risks Harder When Comfortable
Life.content: Taking risks become harder the more you like where you are. Yet so crucial to go over and beyond to be always taking risks

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- They Can Have the Recipe
Life.content: They can have the recipe but they can't make the sauce. They see a very distilled and to their world compressed view, a shallow projection of the immensity of your will they can't grasp. At the deeper level they can't read your will. You must make that so. It should be so yours as so not of the world and of everyone and be written in a language so yours and not of the world and be about something so yours that only you shall will it. Your will is yours to will it.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Know When to Leave
Life.content: Like in everything, you gotta know when to leave. In the casino, when you are figuring something out. Rather leave it just not totally complete than fill it and take away from yourself the opportunity to complete it. Be of the use of time, many people want to finish something right after starting it, not realizing the power to retrieve from letting time pass and coming back to it different, that is what makes it more complete in reality, and big things can be build by consistent coming back to it.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Own the River
Life.content: You own the river and thus it propels you even further, for you ride your wave and that of the world, for you make the world move with the current that brings you farther. So even if the wills of other's that you worshiped manage to be kept away from your ship the river can still be against you, but there you know it and can fight it. Thus a la descartes one must, beyond truth and into will the world maker, we must reject all thought that isn't clear and correct, all wills that we have not tasted and proven, for one's will to be pure, one has to build it from the ground up. One must accept the nothing of the world to make it fully his own. One must believe in its unreality to make it his own reality.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Conditions for Greatness Are Disadvantageous
Life.content: Conditions for your most fundamental greatness are obviously disadvantageous, if that greatness is truly the motive.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Conditions for Greatness Are Disadvantageous II
Life.content: Conditions for your most fundamental greatness are obviously disadvantageous, if that greatness is truly the motive.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- No Idealizations Needed to Light the Fire
Life.content: That with no idealizations you can still light a fire deep within your heart. That shall be your power, that you need no rescue of higher powers, that the very real powers shall be all you need, that yet all the powers shall be what you seek and want. that greatness yet can be measured through your reach, the power of the drives you are able to hold within. The power of your power, your spirit, is the measure of the power which you can hold through those drives that want to escape you, want to be free yet are slaves to your mastery you that exercise control over all that your mind can fathom. The stillness of holding the universe at one fist, above all its an ability of shutting off everything you want. People underestimate how incapable they are of shutting all down. Meditation is the very start where you can let your thoughts go. But people don't understand they can get attached to stuff deeper than passing thoughts, in fact some live a whole life a way that wouldn't be if they could shut off some drives, if they knew themselves and made themselves. You should be a universal instructor and constructor of yourself. You are a universal machine capable of being anything, and a universal constructor capable of building it out whatever it is.

Life.title: Health vs Performance
Life.content: Quotes and questions: health and performance are different things. Is health a part of your performance or your performance a part of your health.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Full Until Intoxication
Life.content: Full you want to be, until intoxication, until you get disgusted at this world of so much living it and eating it. You hope for a meal that now challenges you.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- So Much Death of Moments
Life.content: So much death of moments, that at last at least the will may see itself in this life or the next! Unredeemed is the unfree one. One can't be fulfilled unless one is free.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Freedom of Will in Childhood
Life.content: It is interesting again to think about freedom in childhood. But are you free? The phrase to put. Here and everywhere. Well the will of the child is free and set free, even if all the rest is imposed onto her, even if she doesn't know any better. She does know better. For over time we trade this life affirming freedom of will for freedom of world where our will isn't free. That is the tradeoff Kaczynski wasn't willing to take. Incompleteness of will is the disease of mankind as it entered human age. And its overcoming is the cure to bring about the overhuman, whose freedom is the most real and powerful.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Overcoming the Lost Life
Life.content: Overcoming the lost life is the matter of regaining the lost spirit.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- A Smile That Fades
Life.content: A smile that dies away at a distance. The most harshest of murders for the moment, for it doesn't get exterminated, but rather fades away, never really dying, never really warning. The death of one and onto the next, this perhaps could really be the most fundamental law of nature and law of life, nature in the wild sense. Outros melhores!

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Playful Spirits of Youth
Life.content: The playful spirits that played along with you in those youthful wisdom filled life filled visions that fled with the moment, fled much more thoroughly, much more costly than those of today, which we take easy, but would we that we would grab with teeth and nail those much precious moments that were truly lived. Moments that instead of dying live ferociously. Transcend time. Eternal they were cut short, murdered our innocence, now we can only get a close up, we lack mostly reality. That's what we want to get back. That's my job to live every moment like the overhuman learned from his underhuman child that yet went over and beyond all that humans come to be ripe for. Freedom is interesting to ponder when it was fun to imagine! when you could and were willing to and could afford to throw a day off to some imagination, irrespective of the whole world that wasn't inside your creation. Indifferent to any complications. This people seek, the freedom from complication, but they still only with that fall short of the full child experience. Conserve principles that you long had planted in your heart, and get back to those you have abandoned so they come on even stronger. Everyday is a new day, many people forget that and its consequences.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Who Possessed Whom
Life.content: Who possessed who between you and your moments, and the disloyalty that you both innocently abandon each other.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Silent Grave of Past Moments
Life.content: The silent grave of the past of those moments that are constantly being killed.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Power of Dead Past Moments
Life.content: The power of those dead past moments that come so quick and catch your love of life and arouse your ultimate desire that yet leave traceless and leave you alone at sea. They all make your life the greatest gift. One that even with almost no retribution still is worth the shot.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Everything Fits Only at the End
Life.content: A more real sense in which everything is supposed to fit together only at the end. Rest only at the end not in the middle. Its that only after you've gone through it all perhaps are you ready to go through it all over and get the parts that you didn't. Now that you know it you can actually understand it, considering of doing this with this book. Cause if Zarathustra talking to humans or the overhuman talking to humans, they wouldn't understand a thing at first, order is taught, for you learn biases when learning certain things first. You get exposed not to things you understand and get progressively closer to the vision that is being teached but rather you start getting exposed to it and try to hang on and actually start getting it. So at the beginning a lot of what you see in it you don't understand and can only understand after being through other things that that vision has to offer. So technically you can only start to understand the whole thing after ending it. This is my vision. If you're presented with a whole new vision then this is the path to take. Perhaps we cut ourselves super inefficiently short by only reading a book like this once. Perhaps we did 80 percent of the work to get only 20 per cent of the rewards.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Greatest Praise of Life
Life.content: Maybe the greatest praise of life is the love and will and desire and absolute desire to maximize it. Especially when it doesn't flow your way, when it seems your life is the most fucked.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Finding Resonance with the World
Life.content: There is this aspect of the self coupling with the environment, whether it be nature or the like. When you are in tune to the world, what it is trying to say, what you are trying to know. You can achieve resonance with the world you live. You can find resonances with places, they catch your spirit and set it free and dancing. Verily they do just that, resonance- they amplify you into heights you haven't heretofore imagined, they allow you to go further and get more spirit, more power of power. There is much advice spoiled and spilled on the world that converges on finding resonances in them, and then exploiting them maximally. Not stopping when one finds one. There is an unstill and untillable, undistilled and undistillable force within. A craving that one with words falls short of covering, and that one should follow like one follows light into a tunnel, a glimmer of hope into the way out of plato's cave and into the real world. An instinctive drive that lets one fearless, flow. Fearless and without narration above all. That is what makes the moment so pure and unnamed and untamed. There is nothing you can write about it to bring you closer to it. There is nothing you can write about it that doesn't destroy it as it is being written. One who recounts the moment or narrates it or describes it cannot be living it. One has to distill the undistillable to pass it on, thus one can't pass but a wrong proxy, a simulacra delta dirac that for only he who truly knows it holds value and holds tremendous value. If people were just to stay shut they would see much beyond what they have lived, they would recognize the heights and the value of the moments that only they had.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Life Wants to Grow to Fly
Life.content: Tis life itself, that is, my life, wants to grow into the heights, so that it can go far when it learns to fly. very simple phrase but that explains a lot

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- On Work Done in Vain
Life.content: The notion of stuff done in vain is one most visceral to me in what can be related to the tarantula's preaching of equality. That it is possible to work very hard on stuff that doesn't matter for anyone, maybe not even for you. That your intentions sometimes may count for nothing, and utilitarianism wins. That indeed peace of mind, like many other things, may be a choice, and that you may live your life lying strategically, having all the inner workings figured out by yourself and show only the final product to people.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- The Dangerous Thought of Redundancy
Life.content: the dangerous that those of the masses may not be needed, they may be redundant. That perhaps most people playing the game of the masses and drinking from its well may truly be irrelevant. That maybe most live truly unmeaningful lives. That Zarathustra almost chokes to death on this. This is a dangerous thought not to be carried out to its practical consequences, but to make one run away from the condition of having its life given away for outrem. It puts urgency into living one's way. This rabble shall carry yourself out of it. Shall be the source of your awareness and escape into your life. Thus one intentionally starts living. Being able to smell and swallow the masses pills, yet totally separated, verily of spirit, from this wind of the low lands. Pay it no mind. Pay every single ounce of mind you have into your way. Yet be unrepugnable by anyhow.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Thank the Many Too Many
Life.content: Thank thus the many too many that allowed you to become one, the many too many pieces that allowed you to become whole and sharp. They showed you the way to climb.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Be a Strong Wind Above
Life.content: Be a strong wind that flies over everyone, lives above the masses, has its representative a la god down there, that yet shows no glimpse of the sheer power it holds above.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Drinking Life Through Others' Bottles
Life.content: Unfortunate for those who only drank the pleasure of life through other's bottles. What a shame that there are those who will never know beyond the masses, never come to see their way in life without them. Unclean and impure is the flame that you build with them, by putting wood into their construct.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Knowing the Border of the Game
Life.content: being on another different level is much about being aware of the border of the game that the masses play, having no delusion about its scope and its domain of effectiveness. Not being fooled by the glow of what the game gives to those who play it. Those who will it their lives to trying to win this game. Those who thus rest their power on the belief on this game.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Rule of Thumb: Reject Those Who Sell Misery
Life.content: Rule of thumb- if someone tries to sell you misery, maybe for some more or less eloquent reason, you probably don't want it. so always have this pinch of realism in whatever narrative you create for yourself.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Let Yourself Be Your Greatest Virtue
Life.content: Let yourself be your great virtue and your great source of virtue. You should be your own greatest project. The overhuman sees in you its virtue. Virtue is not the state but the momentum. The virtue of the champion before he becomes the champion. The virtue is thus best seen naked, when it doesn't come with all that it has produced. Let the virtue guide you to become you. Let the joy of virtue be in itself all you need to keep on building it.

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Accepting the Voluntariness of Suffering
Life.content: Not falling prey to one's own story, that one thus shouldn't preach, is in part about accepting the extreme case that all that one did was voluntary and not needed. That all the suffering one put oneself

Life.title: Thus Spoke Zarathustra- Yours Is Yours
